title: Marketing & Ops Systems Manager
description:
JOB RESPONSIBILITIES INCLUDE BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO:



Process Mapping & Funnel Mapping

*Create and maintain process maps on L
 that clearly outline workflows, ownership, dependencies, and handoffs across teams

*Develop funnel maps that document the full customer journey—from traffic source to conversion, follow-up, and retention

*Ensure funnel maps align with execution plans, tools, and automation requirements

*Translate funnel and process maps into actionable task lists and SOPs for designers, developers, and marketers

*Identify gaps, inefficiencies, or breakdowns in workflows and proactively recommend improvements to the COO/CEO

*Break down mapped processes and funnels into clear, executable workflows for the team, to be mobilized in Trello

*Ensure SOPs, checklists, and processes are documented and followed consistently

*Proactively flag risks and tool or personnel challenges with recommended solutions



Reporting & Communication

*Participate in project calls to ensure projects are being executed well, in alignment with established workflows and processes

*Attend project meetings to track all details needed to design processes and determine action items, and follow-through

*Maintain concise, execution-focused communication across all stakeholders



EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS REQUIRED:

*2-3 years of experience in an Ops environment mapping marketing and operational processes, workflows, and training programs

*At least 3 years’ experience on Marketing Team, delivering work aligned with funnel builds, website builds, social media marketing, media buying, etc.

*Proven ability to turn complex projects into clear SOPs and execution plans that work well for remote creative and technical teams

*Intermediate to advanced experience with process mapping tools (e.g., L
)

**WordPress websites

 marketing and automation

*Highly organized, analytical, and proactive problem-solver

**Trello & Slack

**Google Workspace

**Zoom 

**Password management tools

*Demonstrate a solid typing WPM (ideally 55 wpm+)



TECH REQUIREMENTS

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

hourly, depending on experience

title: Content & Admin Support Specialist | Canva + Social Media + Systems
description:
We’re looking for a reliable, creative, and highly organised Content & Admin Support Specialist to join our growing business.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both content execution and structured admin work. At this stage, the role is designed with a 50/50 split between administrative support and content creation/management, allowing you to contribute across both functions as the role continues to evolve.



Over time, this can grow into a more specialised role, depending on your strengths—whether that is more content-focused or more admin-focused—with strong long-term potential as the business expands.



What You’ll Be Doing



Content Creation & Management



Create content using Canva or similar design tools

Provide basic graphic design support for social media and brand assets

Upload, schedule, and manage content across platforms such as
, LinkedIn, and other channels

Support short-form content production including reels, simple edits, and video-based content

Work from provided content, briefs, or AI-assisted drafts

Execute content consistently based on a clear brand direction and strategy

Draft and format SEO-conscious blog posts and articles

Upload and format content in WordPress, Webflow, or similar CMS platforms

Research content ideas and audience engagement opportunities

Track content and social media performance metrics and help compile insights



Admin & Operational Support



Manage inboxes and communication flows with professionalism and accuracy

Prepare, format, and maintain internal files, spreadsheets, and shared folders

Assist with onboarding workflows including forms,
 flows, and CRM updates

Schedule meetings, prepare agendas, and take meeting notes when required

Maintain trackers, databases, and contact lists

Support basic expense tracking and reimbursement summaries

Assist with ad hoc admin and operational projects to keep the business running smoothly



AI Automation & Systems Support



Set up, maintain, and improve workflows using tools like ChatGPT, Zapier, Make, ClickUp, or similar

Help identify tasks that can be automated for better efficiency

Support content tracking, task coordination, and project visibility

Maintain SOPs, templates, and backend documentation in ClickUp or Google Drive

Assist with simple automation workflows for onboarding,
 sequences, and CRM-related tasks

What We’re Looking For

Strong written and verbal English communication

Experience in administration, virtual support, content support, or social media management

Confident using Canva and comfortable with basic content formatting/design

Familiarity with social media platforms and content publishing workflows

Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT

Organised, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple moving parts

Able to follow direction well while also taking initiative

Experience with ClickUp, Google Workspace, WordPress/Webflow, Zapier, or Make is a strong advantage

Basic video editing experience is a plus

Why This Role Is Worth Exploring

Long-term growth potential

Flexible role structure based on your strengths

Opportunity to work across both content and operations

A role where your work will have a direct impact

The chance to grow into a more specialised position over time

How to Apply



Please apply using the link below:



Apply here:

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Job Description:



We are seeking a highly skilled, proactive, and resourceful Executive Assistant to join our company. Someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, can handle multiple tasks efficiently, and is passionate about providing exceptional administrative support.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide high-level administrative support to the executive team, including managing schedules, coordinating meetings, and handling correspondence.

Manage CRM systems, including updating customer information, generating reports, and ensuring smooth workflows.

Assist with social media management and marketing efforts, including creating posts, managing social accounts, and supporting campaign initiatives.

Maintain organization of documents and files, ensuring easy accessibility and proper tracking.

Handle
 communications, screen incoming messages, and provide thoughtful responses on behalf of the executive team.

Support with basic bookkeeping tasks, including managing invoices and tracking sales data.

Conduct research and prepare reports or presentations as needed.

Handle confidential information with utmost discretion and professionalism.



Qualifications:

Strong proficiency in English, both written and verbal.

Advanced experience with CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar).

Proven administrative experience, ideally supporting executives or management teams.

Experience in social media management and marketing.

Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment with minimal supervision.

Excellent time management, organizational, and multitasking skills.

Strong attention to detail, problem-solving abilities, and adaptability.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and project management tools.

Trustworthy, reliable, and able to handle sensitive information with discretion.

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Bookkeeper / Accountant
description:
HI, My name is Don Garcia.  Im the owner of Better Remodels.  Im looking for someone who can either help out with accounting/bookkeeping as needed as "Gig work" or possibly on a part time basis.  This company is young and just getting its foundation laid.  Below is a basic role description that I used AI to generate since I believe this role is fairly standard.



A brief summary of me.  I had my first construction company from
.When the recession hit  about that time, I transitioned into IT and Business Consulting.  After 11 years of working with large Fortune 50-100 companies I d
 to go back to small business.  I opened up my company Better Remodels (part-time) back in 2018.  I also went back to school and received my  MBA from University of California Irvine.  After that, I opened the company full-time.



Still being a typical business owner, I have been wearing all the hats.  I would love to find someone to work with who has  accounting expertise, and someone who can help provide some structure and organization to where I can spend more time on growing the business.  The pay can vary depending on what scope of work we agree on , but at the vary least, I will need help with the generic list below...bookkeeping, reconciling, etc.



If you would like to know more about me:

LinkedIn Profile: 

Website: 

Meyers Briggs: ENTJ 







???? Job Title



Part-Time Bookkeeper / Accountant (QuickBooks Expert) – Cleanup, Reconciliation & Reporting



???? About Us



We are a growing U.S.-based construction and remodeling company (Better Remodels) looking for a reliable and experienced part-time accountant/bookkeeper to help manage and organize our financials.



This is a flexible, ongoing gig opportunity with potential for long-term work based on performance.



???? Role Overview



We are looking for a QuickBooks Online expert who can assist with:



Cleaning up books

Maintaining accurate financial records

Performing reconciliations

Generating financial reports



This role is ideal for someone who already has clients but is looking to take on additional part-time work.



???? Key Responsibilities

???? Bookkeeping Support

Maintain and update books in QuickBooks Online

Categorize transactions accurately

???? Reconciliation

Perform bank and credit card reconciliations

Identify and resolve discrepancies

???? Cleanup & Catch-Up Work

Clean up existing books as needed

Handle catch-up bookkeeping (1 month to 3+ years)

???? Financial Reporting

Generate:

Profit & Loss

Balance Sheet

Ensure reports are clean and accurate

???? AR / AP Support

Assist with tracking income and expenses

Support basic invoicing and expense tracking

???? Year-End Support

Assist with 1099 preparation

Organize books for CPA/tax filing

???? Requirements

Required:

Strong experience with QuickBooks Online

Proven experience in:

Bookkeeping cleanup

Reconciliation

Financial reporting

High attention to detail

Ability to work independently

Preferred:

Experience with construction or job costing

Familiarity with U.S. accounting practices

???? About You

You are detail-oriented and organized

You can work independently without constant direction

You take ownership of your work

You’re comfortable jumping into messy books and fixing them

?? Work Details

Part-time / gig-based (hours will vary)

Flexible schedule

Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Ongoing work available based on performance

???? Compensation

Hourly or per-project (to be discussed)

Based on experience

???? To Apply



Please include:



Your experience with QuickBooks Online

Examples of bookkeeping cleanup or reconciliation work

Your typical hourly rate

Availability (hours per week)

???? Important



This is not an entry-level role.

We are looking for someone who can step in, assess, and execute with minimal supervision.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

title: Chief Operating Officer (COO) / Integrator for Scaling U.S. Law Firm (Remote)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based law firm seeking a highly seasoned, operationally elite Chief Operating Officer to take full command of firm operations and help scale intelligently, profitably, and with discipline.

This role requires a true operator—someone who quickly sees inefficiencies, identifies revenue leaks, imposes accountability, and builds systems that allow a founder-led firm to operate at a significantly higher level.

You must think like an owner, act with discretion, and execute with speed.

This is not an assistant role. This is a senior leadership position responsible for turning a successful legal practice into a highly organized, scalable operating company.

Core Mission

Drive operational excellence across all departments while increasing profitability, reducing waste, improving production efficiency, and building the systems required for scale.

You Will Own

Full law firm operations oversight

Build and enforce systems, SOPs, workflows, and accountability

Implement and manage EOS across the organization

Design and monitor dashboards for performance, KPIs, profitability, and bottlenecks

Oversee intake, sales process, and conversion systems

Build or optimize the sales department

Monitor marketing spend, vendor performance, CAC, ROI, and lead quality

Improve staffing structure and productivity

Reduce overhead and eliminate inefficiencies

Organize internal file systems, shared drives, and information architecture

Standardize internal communication and execution discipline

Create operational visibility across attorneys, staff, billing, and client lifecycle

Work directly with founder to convert strategic priorities into execution

Strong Preference

Prior COO / Integrator experience inside a law firm

Family law / divorce law operational understanding strongly preferred

Experience with legal intake systems, retainers, collections, attorney production, and client lifecycle

Experience scaling professional services firms

Required Competencies

Strong financial intelligence (margin, ROI, overhead control, production cost analysis)

Ability to quickly diagnose organizational dysfunction

Strong systems mind

Deep accountability orientation

Exceptional judgment

High trustworthiness and discretion

Strong leadership without unnecessary ego

Ability to enter complexity and create order quickly

Systems Experience Preferred

PracticePanther

GoHighLevel

Airtable

Google Workspace

EOS scorecards / meeting cadence / accountability charts

What Success Looks Like in First 6 Months

Clear organizational structure

Department scorecards live

Sales department functioning with measurable close ratios

Marketing costs tied to case-type profitability

SOP library operational

Waste reduced

Founder no longer trapped in daily operational friction

Revenue visibility by department and case type

This Role Is Not For Someone Who

Needs constant direction

Is theoretical but slow to execute

Cannot challenge inefficiency

Avoids hard accountability

Has never owned outcomes

To Apply

Submit:

Resume

Detailed summary of firms or businesses you have operationally scaled

One example where you materially increased profitability

One example where you reduced overhead or rebuilt systems

Short video explaining how you would approach a founder-led law firm with inconsistent systems and rapid growth.  Compensation based on experience and proven executive ability. Starting range: $3,000–$4,000 USD monthly, with performance-based increases tied to measurable operational impact.

title: VA COLD CALLER
description:
**FULL-TIME VIRTUAL ASSISTANT – COLD CALLER & OPERATIONS | Marketing Agency | USA & CANADA MARKET**



We are a growing marketing agency working with construction companies across the United States and Canada. We are looking for a highly motivated, reliable, and fluent English-speaking Virtual Assistant to join our team full-time.



This is a long-term position with real earning potential. We reward performance.



---



**ABOUT THE ROLE:**



Your main job is to call 100 construction businesses per day in the USA and Canada, follow our proven script, qualify leads, and pass interested prospects directly to our closer. You will also handle follow-up and basic operations tasks during the rest of your shift.



---



**YOUR DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:**



???? Cold Calling (5 hours/day)

- Call 100 businesses per day from a list we provide

- follow or if you have ideas the its fine improvising if  needed

- Identify the decision maker (owner or manager)

- Qualify leads based on criteria we provide

- Immediately notify the closer via WhatsApp when a prospect shows interest

- Log every call in our CRM: answered / not answered / proposal sent / interested / not interested / callback requested



???? Operations (3 hours/day)

- Send follow-up
s or Instagram DMs to leads that didn't answer

- Help grow and organize the prospect list using Google Maps and free tools

- Keep CRM updated with accurate notes after every call

- Send a daily end-of-shift report including: total calls made, interested leads, follow-ups sent, callbacks scheduled



---



**REQUIREMENTS:**



? Fluent English neutral or North American accent preferred, clear and confident speaking voice (non-negotiable)

? Minimum 6 months of cold calling or phone sales experience in the US or Canadian market

? Good quality headset and microphone

? Available Monday to Friday, 8 hours/day during North American business hours (EST or PST) — note: this will require night shift in the Philippines

? Comfortable using Google Sheets, WhatsApp, and basic CRM tools

? Self-managed, honest, and punctual we don't micromanage but we track results daily



---



**COMPENSATION:**



???? Base salary: $300/month  paid weekly via Wise or PayPal

???? Performance bonus:

- $5 for every qualified lead that books a call with our closer

- $25–$50 for every client that signs a contract from your calls

- Top performers can earn an additional $200–$500/month on top of base salary



???? Stable long-term position  we grow, you grow



---



**HOW TO APPLY:**



Do NOT just send your resume. Generic applications will be ignored immediately.



To be considered you MUST include ALL of the following:



1. ? A 2-minute voice recording in English where you introduce yourself AS IF you were making a real cold call to a construction company owner in Canada or the USA (follow this structure: introduction ? reason for calling ? qualifying question ? close for appointment)

2. ? Your resume or a short summary of your relevant experience

3. ? Written answers to these 3 questions:

   - How many calls per day did you make in your last role?

   - What country/market were you calling?

   - What was your average conversion rate from calls to appointments?



Applications missing the voice recording or the 3 questions will not be reviewed — no exceptions.



---



We are hiring immediately. Only serious, experienced candidates apply.

title: Automotive Glass Sales Agent B2C
description:
Fix.Glass is a dynamic, customer-focused company in the vehicle glass replacement industry. We are looking for motivated Internal Sales Agents to join our remote team! You will handle high-volume inbound sales leads, answer and make calls, send messages, book jobs, and order parts and above all manage client expectations! If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and have excellent communication and negotiation skills, we want to hear from you!







Key Responsibilities:



Handle inbound and outbound sales calls professionally.

Respond to customer inquiries via phone and messaging platforms on our all in one customized platform which helps you in sales to keep perfect track over every single lead.

Process job bookings and coordinate part orders.

Convert leads into successful sales using negotiation and problem-solving skills.

Maintain accurate records and meet sales targets.

Ensure bookings are attended to and all communication and services are managed between all parties.

Order parts from our suppliers.

Able to work in a fast paced environment, all leads have a short life cycle.

Work Schedule And Compensation:

You will work under one of the following shift patterns - UK time 08:00am to 20:00pm

Choose your shift type:



Shift type 1: 3 days on, 1 day off (11 hour shift +1 hour lunch) 110 hours over two weeks  



Shift type 2: 3 days on, 2 days off (11 hour shift +1 hour lunch) 88 hours over two weeks



28 Paid Holidays accumulated per calendar year. We do not follow weekdays or national holidays. Holidays must be chosen manually yourself, and you can match them with national holidays if you wish.

Probation period is 6 months, during this time you can accumulate paid leave but can only use it on public holidays within your Country.

Payments made Wednesday every two weeks straight into your bank account.

Salary: Paid per hour £4.40, you will need to make more commission than hours worked to get a good production rate.





Requirements: ?



A quiet home workspace with a professional setup.

A PC and dual monitor, wired microphone, and cable fiber internet connection for seamless communication (WIFI not recommended).

Strong sales, negotiation, and problem-solving skills.

Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and able to work independently.

PC and technical knowledge is a must.

Attention to detail.

Why Join Fix.Glass?



Remote Work: Enjoy the freedom of working from the comfort of your home.

Innovative Environment: Be part of a forward-thinking company with a passion for excellence.

Supportive Team: Work alongside a collaborative team dedicated to your success.

On average our top Sales agent makes £800 - £1000+ or more every two weeks if you push to succeed!

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Company: Winston Gray

Location: Phillipines (Remote)

Hours: 38 hours per week

Contract: 3 month initial contract with extension opportunity



About Winston Gray

Winston Gray is a boutique business transformation firm working with founders, CEOs, and leadership teams navigating growth, complexity, and change. Our work re-creates and re-defines businesses by creating operational efficiencies, removing bottlenecks and streamlining processes. 



Winston Gray is one of the fastest growing business transformation firms in Australia, working with medium to extra large commercial companies. 



The baseline of marketing at Winston Gray is to harmonies the work we do by building digital authority. We do not market to chase leads, trends, or algorithms.



The Role

We are looking for a sharp, structured Marketing Manager to run our authority-led content engine. This role is execution-focused, detail-oriented, and requires strong editorial judgement.



You will work closely with the Director, translating her thinking, voice notes, and strategic direction into high-quality written and visual content across LinkedIn, SEO articles and the website.



This is not a social media role.

This is not a growth hacking role.

This is a credibility and content operations role.



Key Responsibilities

Content & LinkedIn

• Draft LinkedIn posts for both the Founder (primary) and Winston Gray (secondary)

• Work within clearly defined content pillars and post types

• Manage scheduling, formatting, and content tracking

• Maintain a clean, organised content library



SEO & Articles

• Use Google Trends and search analysis to identify ownable topics

• Draft long-form articles aligned to senior, AFR-style editorial standards

• Ensure articles are intentional, well-structured, and optimised (not keyword dumping)

• Maintain internal linking and article hygiene



Video Support

• Light editing of 1 founder-led video per week

• Add captions and basic formatting

• No heavy effects, trends, or overproduction



Website Hygiene

• Keep blog and website content current and aligned to positioning

• Make light copy updates as needed

• Ensure consistency across channels



Reporting & Coordination

• Prepare weekly content summaries and upcoming schedules

• Flag decisions or approvals required

• Track what is drafted, approved, live, and in backlog



This role is not to:

• chase trends

• post daily

• write tips-and-tricks content

• run paid ads or lead funnels

• optimise for vanity metrics



Required Experience

• Understanding and experience of the Key Responsibilities (above)

• Strong written English (non-negotiable)

• Background in B2B content, consulting, finance, legal, or professional services preferred

• Experience working from draft notes and senior input

• Strong editorial judgement and ability to maintain tone

• Comfortable working asynchronously with clear standards



What Good Looks Like

• Content sounds calm, senior, and credible

• Founder voice is preserved, not diluted

• Marketing plans are created and executed on time 

• Marketing is structured, consistent to tone and brand

• Content is disciplined, not busy or fluffy

• Written formats are refined, meaningful and clear

Resume

Short video introduction

title: Setup and Test Dating App (Tinder/Bumble/HInge) Profile for Men
description:
We need someone who knows how to setup multiple online dating (Tinder/Hinge/Bumble) profile accounts with the purpose of testing whether the photos we made for them are getting likes and matches with beautiful women. This is for our (mostly) European and American male clients.



Our company is one of the fastest growing companies in the online dating niche. Our goal is to become THE biggest online dating consultant in the world, and you have the opportunity to be an integral part of that growth.



Our mission is to help address the male loneliness epidemic by helping men meet their dream girl and achieve their dream dating life.



BENEFITS OF WORKING WITH US:

-The role can become full-time and you can become our personal trusted VA if you prove to be a top performer 

-The hours will inevitably increase as our business continue to scale globally and we sign up more premium clients

-Consistent weekly (even daily) work

-Work whenever and wherever you are so long as deadlines are met

-We’re building a long-term, high-functioning team that you can be a part of

-Opportunity to become a core operator

-You become an important part of a transformation that enables our clients to meet their dream girl and achieve their dream dating life

-A Filipino founder who speaks fluent Tagalog

title: Event video and photo editor
description:
Event Video Editor Needed

We’re looking for a talented event video editor who can create exciting, high quality recap videos that capture the energy, people, and atmosphere of live events. This role is specifically for editors with event editing experience.

What You’ll Do

• Edit event recap videos and highlight reels

• Create engaging vertical videos for Instagram and TikTok

• Capture the vibe, energy, and key 
nts of each event

title: Sales Executive
description:

 • Build and maintain targeted lead lists of brands aligned with our creators (tech, automotive, consumer electronics, etc.)

 • Execute cold
 outreach campaigns to generate new business opportunities

mbers to refine targeting and messaging

?

-based)

?



Performance Expectations

s daily

?

?

title: B2B Lead Scout (AI Visibility) – Legal & Real Estate
description:
We are a high-end AI Optimization agency helping professional firms (Law and Real Estate) capture the shift from Google Search to AI search (ChatGPT). We are looking for a Lead Scout to identify "invisible" firms and book them for a 15-minute Market Analysis.



Why this is a great role:



No Closing: You are only responsible for the initial 5-minute call and booking the appointment.

High Upside: We pay for performance. One close can net you a $100 bonus.

Vetted Leads: We provide the list; no manual lead generation required.



Compensation:



Base: $5.00 USD / hour.

The "Show" Bonus: $20.00 for every prospect that attends the 15-minute audit.

The "Close" Bonus: $100.00 for every deal closed from your appointments. 



Requirements:

Professional, neutral accent.

Experience with MyPhoner or similar power dialers.

Must be comfortable speaking with Law Firm Partners and Real Estate Brokers





How to Apply:

Please send a brief voice recording (under 60 seconds) introducing yourself. Tell us about your experience calling professional B2B firms.

title: Full-Stack Systems Architect & UI/UX Designer
description:
The Mission

Kinetic Marketing Co is a high-growth agency specializing in lead-generation "Engines" for high-ticket home transformation businesses (Construction, Renovations, Security). We don’t build "average" websites. We build premium, high-converting digital assets that position our clients as the #1 authority in their market.



We are looking for a Systems Architect who can blend technical GHL expertise with world-class UI/UX design across multiple platforms.



Key Responsibilities

Multi-Platform Development: Build and manage high-converting landing pages and websites across GoHighLevel (GHL), WordPress, and Shopify.



UI/UX Design: Create "Lambo-standard" designs that look premium and are optimized for 10/10 conversion rates.



Operational Workflows: Build and maintain complex backend automations (Workflows, Webhooks, API integrations via 
).



Agency Operations: Manage client onboarding technicals, DNS settings, and internal agency systems in ClickUp.



Collaboration: Work alongside the Director and Video Editor to ensure a seamless "Kinetic" brand experience across all funnels.



Requirements (The "Edge")

The Design Eye: You must have a portfolio that proves you can design high-end, modern layouts (Minimalist, bold, and professional).



Platform Mastery: Advanced knowledge of GHL (Snapshots, Custom Values, Proposall), WordPress (Elementor/Divi), and Shopify.



Technical Logic: You understand how to bridge data between different tools (CRMs,
, SMS).



Communication: Exceptional English (written and verbal) and a proactive "problem-solver" attitude.



Schedule: Ability to work 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEDT (Melbourne Time).



What We Offer

Full-Time Stability: 40 hours per week with a focus on long-term growth.



Professional Identity: You will be provided with a professional KMC
 and integrated into our leadership team.



Supportive Culture: We value high performance and provide the tools you need to succeed.



Fortnightly Pay: Consistent and reliable payments via Wise.



How to Apply

Please send your Portfolio (Direct links to GHL funnels, WordPress sites, or Shopify stores you have built).

Note: We are looking for custom-feel designs. If your portfolio is primarily stock templates, please do not apply.

title: Law Firm Receptionist
description:
We are a fast-moving U.S. law firm seeking an exceptionally sharp, emotionally intelligent, and highly reliable remote receptionist to become the first point of contact for our clients, courts, vendors, and legal teams.

This is not a passive answering role. You will serve as the voice and tone of the firm—handling sensitive conversations, directing urgent matters correctly, protecting attorney time, and ensuring every caller experiences professionalism, calm, and confidence.  We need someone who is highly intelligent, emotionally mature, fast with technology, and capable of reading situations with judgment.

    What You Will Do

Answer incoming calls professionally and confidently in fluent English

Handle emotionally sensitive callers with calm, empathy, and control

Route calls accurately to attorneys, paralegals, or departments

Schedule appointments and manage calendars precisely

Monitor voi
,
, and internal communication channels

Enter and update information in firm systems with accuracy

Follow communication protocols without missing details

Recognize urgency and escalate matters correctly

Maintain composure when clients are stressed, upset, or confused

Support attorneys and staff by protecting workflow and preventing interruptions

        Who We Are Looking For

You must be:

Extremely intelligent and quick to understand context

Highly emotionally intelligent (able to read tone, regulate difficult conversations, and remain composed)

Naturally organized and detail-driven

Excellent in spoken and written English

Confident speaking with professionals and distressed clients alike

Fast with software and willing to learn systems quickly

Able to think independently without constant supervision

Mature, discreet, and highly dependable

                  You Will Stand Out If You Have

Experience in a law firm, medical office, executive office, or high-pressure client service role or in hospitality field.

Experience handling U.S. clients by phone

Strong scheduling discipline

CRM or case-management software experience

Excellent listening skills and strong memory

           This Role Is NOT for Someone Who

Waits to be told every next step

Becomes overwhelmed easily

Misses details

Struggles with difficult conversations

Has weak English communication

Technical Requirements

Quiet professional workspace

Stable high-speed internet

Reliable computer

Noise-cancelling headset

Camera-ready for internal meetings.  We need dependable people only. Not a part time position.

title: ???? Rockstar Customer Service & Dispatch Coordinator Needed, High Growth Role
description:
???? Rockstar Customer Service & Dispatch Coordinator Needed, High Growth Role



We are not looking for a typical VA.



We are building a fast-growing service company in Florida, and we need someone who can operate at a high level, think fast, and handle real responsibility.



If you are organized, detail-oriented, and great with customers, this could turn into a long-term opportunity.





About Us:



We are Palmway Pools, a premium pool service company that services residential homes and Airbnb properties.



Our customers rely on us to keep their pools in perfect condition, especially when guests are staying at their homes.



That means communication, speed, and attention to detail matter at a very high level.







What You’ll Be Doing:



You will be the bridge between customers and our field technicians.



This is not just customer support, this is operations.



* Answer inbound calls and messages from customers

* Coordinate and dispatch technicians efficiently

* Handle scheduling, rescheduling, and urgent issues

* Communicate clearly with both customers and the field team

* Track jobs and ensure nothing falls through the cracks

* Follow up with customers to ensure satisfaction

* Keep everything organized and documented





 Tools You’ll Be Using:



* WhatsApp

* Slack

* Go High Level (GHL)



What We’re Looking For:



We are looking for someone sharp.



* Excellent English, both written and spoken

* Experience in a service-based business (home services is a big plus)

* Strong attention to detail, you catch things others miss

* Fast thinker, able to handle pressure and make decisions

* Highly organized and proactive

* Great with customers, calm, professional, and confident

* Reliable and responsive, we move fast







This Role Is NOT For You If:



* You need constant supervision

* You miss details or forget tasks

* You are slow to respond

* You struggle with handling multiple things at once





## This Role IS For You If:



* You take ownership and solve problems

* You like being busy and moving fast

* You want to grow with a company long term

* You care about doing things right the first time





 Growth Opportunity:



This is a performance-based role.



If you perform at a high level, there will be opportunities for increased pay and more responsibility over time.



We reward reliability, speed, and attention to detail.





How to Apply:



To apply, send a message with:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with customer service and dispatching

3. A voice recording (30 to 60 seconds) explaining why you would be a good fit

4. The word **Palmway** at the top of your application so we know you read everything





If you are sharp, organized, and ready to grow, we want to hear from you.

title: Senior Service Desk / Helpdesk Manager (Higher Education)
description:
• Reports to Senior Consultant, Digital Transformation

• Permanent, Full-Time

• Client-facing role

• Excellent English (essential)

• Philippines-based, corporate leadership background preferred

• Critical thinker with proven problem-solving ability



About the role



We are looking for someone to join our International Team as a Senior Service / HelpDesk Manager (Service Delivery Manager) for our client projects. This role will sit within our Digital Transformation business line, supporting universities and higher education providers to deliver exceptional post-implementation and operational support.



In this role, you will be accountable for managing the transition of technology projects into operational support, delivering high-quality service to clients, and driving ongoing improvements across client engagements.



You will be working across complex, multi-stakeholder environments, with a strong focus on managing i
, request, change, and escalation processes/ You’ll take ownership of major i
, coordinate resolution activities, monitor performance, and continuously identify opportunities for service improvement, ensuring SLAs and client expectations are met.





Key responsibilities:



• Accountable for high quality service support functions

• Ownership of I
, Request, Change and Escalation processes, ensuring timely response, accurate reporting and establishing service improvement activities when required

• Manage the helpdesk function, ensuring support tickets are triaged, assigned, resolved, and closed within SLA.

• Take ownership of major i
, ensuring coordination of resolving parties, effective communication to stakeholders and post i
 review

• Monitor, control and support service delivery, ensuring systems, methodologies and procedures are in place and followed

• Ensure a strong understanding of technology projects is developed so that service transition impact is known and planned for

• Accountable for the quality of service and performance; ensuring future demand from growth and projects is understood and factored into capacity plans

• Creation of standard operating procedures for key service delivery functions

• Become the trusted advisor of customers by effectively understanding key goals and strategizing with Service Delivery team to support and ensure customer success

• Manage stakeholder communication and expectation management

• Work with delivery teams to ensure meeting of SLA’s and standard turn-around times





What we are looking for (selection criteria):



• Proven experience managing end-to-end service delivery or technology projects, including meeting hard deadlines and delivering to scope.

• Strong background in helpdesk or service desk operations, with experience triaging and resolving support tickets in a client-facing environment.

• Familiarity with cloud-based software or SaaS platforms, ideally in a support or implementation role.

• Fluent in English as you will be the primary point of contact for clients, partners, and coordinating the work with our internal team. You should be able to effectively communicate requirements, timelines, etc. Experience in collaborating with clients and partners to achieve project goals is important

• Highly organised, able to manage competing priorities and meet strict deadlines without compromising quality and thrives in a fast-paced environment. You need to ensure that activities are tracking to plan and schedules, and deliverables are submitted on time without compromising quality.

• Demonstrated success in managing mid-to-large projects, with a proven ability to deliver on-time and within scope.

• Comfortable handling complex or escalated service issues and driving them to resolution.

• Able to roll their sleeves up and do the leg work in key project activities.





Desired (but not essential):



• Experience working with higher education institutions or supporting education-focused IT systems.

• Exposure to transitioning technology projects into managed service environments

• Familiarity with ITIL or similar service management frameworks

• Experience supporting cloud-based SaaS tools or platform deployments

• Experience working with international teams





Other Requirements:



• A modern computer with minimum specs: i5 processor or equivalent, 8GB RAM (ideally 16GB), 250GB HD and must support and capable of running software used by DVE including Microsoft 365 suite, Microsoft Visio

• Fibre, DSL or Cable internet as your main internet connection (stable) with internet speed of at least 150Mbps

• A backup 4G/LTE/5G internet connection (could be a Wi-Fi dongle or pocket Wi-Fi)

• Conducive work environment and home office setup

• Chrome browser, Adobe Acrobat reader

• Genuine Windows OS installation - some internal software we use do not work with MacOS

• UPS/backup generator (preferred)





Some of the reasons why you should be a member of the DVE Team:



• Full-time, long-term contract

• Ability to work from home and not have to commute to and from work

• Experience working with an Australian company

• Challenging and rewarding, with opportunities to progress and grow your role and career

• Work with a great team that supports you.

• HMO and leave benefits

• Opportunity to receive periodic coaching from senior tea
mbers





About DVE Solutions



DVE Business Solutions is a growing consulting company with a difference, led by South Australia Telstra Young Business Woman of the Year Jo Schneider. DVE clients are predominantly in the education sector with Universities and Higher Ed providers being core focus. With our communicative and collaborative methodology, DVE drives positive change that makes a difference in the areas of People, Process, Structure and Technology.



We work every day to change education from the inside out, and our work is underpinned by our core values - Work as OneTeam; Practice what we preach; Maintain client focus and; Enjoy what we do.

title: Recruitment Support Specialist. (Admin & Compliance experience required)
description:
Admin & Recruitment Support Specialist

Full-Time | Remote | Australian Recruitment Company



We are an Australian-based BPO, seeking an experienced Admin and Recruitment Support specialist for our client, an Australian recruitment company. This full time (FT) role is 40 hours per week, during Australian business hours 9am-5pm AEST. Offering the flexibility of working-from-home (WFH) and a market leading salary package + paid leave + bonuses. 



This is a fast-paced, multi-functional role supporting administration, recruitment, marketing, and compliance. We’re looking for someone highly organized, proactive, reliable, and confident working across multiple systems and stakeholders.



*****Key Responsibilities Include*****



General Administration

• Manage LinkedIn activity for a senior tea
mber 

• Respond to daily internal admin queries 

• Answer incoming calls via Aircall 

• Take minutes in weekly company meetings 

• Track internal events (EOFY awards, birthdays, anniversaries, team recognition) 

• Raise and follow up system tickets (Bullhorn / Astute) 

• Support internal requests (employment letters, account confirmations, super follow-ups) 

• Attend tea
etings and align on priorities 



Recruitment Admin & Compliance

• Format candidate CVs using ReMake 

• Conduct reference checks (phone + Referoo) 

• Complete VEVO checks and validate visa information in Astute 

• Maintain and update candidate records in Bullhorn (BH) 

• Manage onboarding support and troubleshooting 

• Handle time-sensitive onboarding queries 

• Send and update Confirmation of Assignment details 

• Track compliance items (police checks, references, NUR forms) 

• Manage job ad postings and updates 

• Maintain Care Team inbox and candidate communication 

• Support temp placement approvals and documentation 

• Prepare employment verification letters 



Marketing Support

• Send new starter “get to know you” communications 

• Create basic graphics using Canva 

• Assist with presentations 

• Manage testimonials and website updates 

• Support internal campaigns (e.g. Life Saver of the Month) 

• Prepare welcome packs for new starters 



Reporting, Compliance & Analytics

• Prepare monthly compliance and placement reports 

• Generate reports from Astute and Bullhorn Analytics 

• Track team and individual targets 

• Produce client and internal performance reports 

• Support compliance tracking and approvals 

• Assist with data accuracy and system integrations 



*****Systems & Tools You’ll Use*****

• Bullhorn (CRM) 

• Astute 

• Referoo 

• Aircall 

• ReMake (CV formatting tool) 

• Canva 

• LinkedIn 

• Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) 



***** Key Requirements Include ***** MUST HAVES to apply



• At least 2 years previous experience in recruitment admin, HR admin, or high-volume admin support. 

• At least 2 years previous experience with compliance and onboarding for recruitment. 

• High level of proficiency with LinkedIN/ LinkedIN Recruiter.

• High level of proficiency with Bullhorn. ATS and CRM.

• Previous experience working with international clients, AUS, US or UK. 

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills 

• Excellent written and spoken English. 

• Confidence speaking to clients and candidates over the phone. 

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines 

• Comfortable working across multiple systems 



IDEAL CANDIDATES have

• Previous experience in an Australian recruitment agency environment 

• Familiarity with Astute 



*****Important – How To Apply*****



To be considered, please follow these instructions:

1. Link your CV for us to review. 

2. Provide an overview of your WFH set-up. ( You must have your own work device, fast and reliable internet, back-up internet and power options, co-working space/internet cafe within 20 minutes travel time). 

3. Provide a short outline of your experience in recruitment/ admin support/ compliance. 

4. List the systems/tools you’ve used (e.g. Bullhorn, CRM, etc.) 

5. Provide a short video/voice introduction to yourself. 



Applications that do not follow instructions may not be reviewed.



Thank you

title: YouTube Video Editor
description:
We're looking for a YouTube video editor/animator in the for our long-form channel in the aviation explainer niche.



These content style focuses on clean, relatively minimal animations and images, with a touch of humor. 

Reference this channel for the style of editing that we need: 



What you'll be working on:

- Creating engaging videos focused on explaining different aviation topics

- Need to source images/videos/graphics to match the script & vo

- Maintaining a consistent editing style across the channel



Requirements: 

- Strong knowledge of commercial and military aviation

- Strong experience with Adobe Premiere Pro (or AE)

- Portfolio with similar work to the channel linked above

- Fast and responsive communication

- Ability to meet deadlines



Work details:

- Paid per min (rate negotiable)

- Long-term position if performance & quality is strong

- Clear feedback and fair revisions



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

Please send:

- 1-2 examples of longform videos you edited in the style of the channel linked above

- Channels you have worked on/are working on

- A short note on how soon you are available to start

- Include "Boeing" at the beginning of your application



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be ignored.

title: GoHighLevel Specialist / CRM & Automation VA
description:
About Us

Kinetic Marketing Co is a Melbourne-based digital marketing agency specialising in lead generation, CRM automation, and growth systems for trades businesses and home improvement contractors across Australia. We run Meta Ads, Google Ads, and build end-to-end client systems using GoHighLevel. We're a fast-moving agency and we need someone who can keep up.



The Role

We're looking for a GoHighLevel specialist who can hit the ground running. You'll be responsible for building, managing, and optimising client accounts inside GHL — from pipeline setup through to full automation workflows. This is a hands-on execution role. We don't have time to train someone from scratch — we need someone who already knows GHL deeply and can take a brief and deliver without constant hand-holding.



What You'll Be Doing



-Building and managing GHL sub-accounts for new and existing clients

-Setting up pipelines, stages, and opportunity management

-Building automation workflows — SMS,
, task triggers, lead nurture sequences

-Setting up and customising landing pages and funnels inside GHL

-Configuring lead forms, calendars, and booking systems

-Connecting integrations (Zapier, Webhooks, third-party tools)

-Building and managing GoHighLevel snapshots

-Troubleshooting automations and client account issues

-Communicating build progress clearly with the team

-Bonus: WordPress website builds for clients who require it





What We're Looking For

Non-negotiable:



-Minimum 2 years hands-on GoHighLevel experience

-Strong understanding of automation logic and CRM workflows

-Able to work independently with minimal supervision

-Excellent written English communication

-Detail-oriented — you check your own work before submitting

-Responsive and proactive — you raise issues before they become problems

-Available to overlap with Australian business hours (AEST)



Highly regarded:



-WordPress build experience (Elementor or similar)

-Experience working with trades or home service businesses

-Familiarity with Meta Ads lead form integrations into GHL

-Experience building client-facing reporting or dashboards





How to Apply

To be considered you must include the following in your application:



A short Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking us through a GoHighLevel build you have completed — show us a workflow, pipeline, or automation you're proud of



A brief summary of your GHL experience and the types of clients/industries you've worked with

Your availability and preferred hourly rate in USD



Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

We're hiring immediately. If you're the right person, you'll be onboarded fast.

title: Landscape Designer (Vectorworks Proficiencies)
description:
Position Description: Virtual Assistant – Landscape Construction Drawings & 3D Rendering

About the Role



We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our landscape design studio in delivering high-quality construction documentation and 3D visualisations.



This role is suited to someone with strong technical expertise in Vectorworks and Enscape, who can confidently translate design intent into clear, buildable drawings and high-end visual renders.



You will work closely with the lead designer to bring concepts to life, ensuring projects are both visually compelling and accurately documented for construction.



Key Responsibilities

Construction Documentation (Vectorworks)

Produce detailed landscape construction drawing sets using Vectorworks

Prepare plans including:

Layout and set-out plans

Levels and drainage plans

Planting plans

Lighting and services plans

Construction details and sections

Ensure all drawings are clear, accurate, and ready for construction

Maintain consistent studio standards, including classes, layers, line weights, and sheet layouts

Implement revisions efficiently based on markups and feedback

3D Rendering & Visualisation (Enscape)

Build and refine 3D models within Vectorworks

Produce high-quality renders using Enscape

Apply realistic materials, lighting, and planting to reflect design intent

Create still renders and, where required, simple walkthroughs

Ensure all visual outputs align with the studio’s aesthetic and quality expectations



Collaboration & Workflow

Interpret sketches, markups, and verbal direction from the lead designer

Communicate clearly around timelines, progress, and deliverables

Manage multiple projects and deadlines efficiently

Maintain organised file structures, naming conventions, and version control



Required Skills & Experience

Advanced proficiency in Vectorworks (essential)

Strong experience using Enscape for rendering (essential)

Proven experience producing construction-ready documentation

Strong understanding of:

Landscape construction methods

Materials and detailing

Levels, drainage, and set-out principles

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to work from sketches, PDFs, and design markups



Preferred (Not Essential)

Experience working on Australian residential landscape projects

Understanding of local construction standards and materials

Experience with planting plans and schedules

Background in landscape architecture, architecture, or horticulture



Working Style & Expectations

Remote, flexible working arrangement

Reliable availability for communication and feedback

Ability to work independently while taking clear direction

Fast turnaround times with a strong focus on quality

Open to feedback and iterative design refinement



Key Outcomes

High-quality, buildable construction drawing sets delivered in Vectorworks

Realistic, high-end 3D renders produced through Enscape

Consistent documentation and visual output aligned with studio standards

Efficient support across multiple projects



About the Studio



Poa Landscape Design is a Melbourne-based studio focused on creating modern, native landscapes that are both functional and highly considered. Our work blends natural materials with strong design intent to create spaces that feel calm, immersive, and connected to place.

title: Aquisition Cold Caller
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Acquisitions Cold Caller (Real Estate) – $8–$10/hr + Generous Commissions | Night Shift

Apply Here: ???? 

We are a fast-growing US-based real estate acquisitions company that buys distressed and off-market properties from motivated sellers. This is a highly specialized, high-paying role for an experienced cold caller who excels at sales, negotiation, running comps, and setting qualified appointments.

Schedule

Monday–Friday, 10:30 AM – 6:30 PM Eastern Time (EST)

40 hours per week + paid 1-hour lunch

(Night shift in Philippines: ~11:30 PM – 7:30 AM)

Compensation



$8.00 – $10.00 per hour (based on experience)

Uncapped commissions on every closed deal (top performers earn significantly more)

Bi-Weekly payouts via Wise or PayPal (whatever is lowest fees at the time)



Key Responsibilities



Make 80–120+ outbound cold calls daily to motivated sellers

Handle objections, negotiate, and build rapport

Run property comps on Zillow and analyze values

Present data-backed purchase offers

Update leads in our CRM and set high-quality appointments



Requirements



Proven cold calling / sales experience (real estate experience strongly required)

Skilled at negotiation and overcoming objections

Familiar with Zillow, running comps, and CRM systems

Excellent spoken English and professional phone presence

Self-motivated, reliable high-speed internet, quiet workspace, and headset

Available for the full night-shift schedule



What We Offer



Competitive base + uncapped commissions

Paid training and ongoing support from our US team

Long-term full-time role with growth potential

Respectful, results-driven work environment



Apply Here: ???? 

Only serious, experienced applicants who fully complete the Google Form (including resume and voice sample) will be considered. We move quickly for the right candidate.

This is a great opportunity to earn strong income with a skilled acquisitions team. Apply now — position won’t stay open long!

title: Revenue Generating Specialist
description:
Dear Prospective Revenue Generating Specialist:



Are you great at selling? 



Are you so confident you can sell you'll even guarantee that your sales work will pay... well you tell me - How many multiples of your salary are you certain you can generate, month after month!?



~25% of your time will be getting people promoting "We Are Rebuilding America", which costs US$50 after people opt-in at http://www.WeAreRebuildingAmerica.com.



~25% will be taking my existing products, updating them to promote WARA and current work, and selling them through sites such as ClickBank, Fiverr, Warrior Forum, Amazon, eBay, Spotify, my blog, etc.



~ 25% will be getting top affiliates in the personal growth, prosperity, mindset and coaching communities to promote these products, and WARA.



~ 25% might be getting other bloggers and content curators to use my content on their sites, and getting media to run my stories, and get involved with WARA, and getting U.S. businesses to promote it to their clients, online and off.



You're ideally a self-starter, who says, "Today I'll create and begin selling these products; tomorrow these three over here" at the same time you strategically get the word out about how We Are Rebuilding America.



Your purpose is to do almost all of my marketing for me, to free my time to create coaching and training programs.



Much of your focus will be on developing the assets I have, so they're generating money automatically, each month.



Important, before you apply...



Learn what my Vision is, and what I'm about.



Every time I have posted jobs here, it seems about 75-80% of the people don't even take the time to give me the information I request; that's the surest way to "scream" - "Ignore me; because I've ignored you". 



That's the equivalent of spam. It fails, and wastes their time, and mine.



Instead, just take a moment and go to http://www.WeAreRebuildingAmerica.com/Top64-Reasons-Why/ReasonNum47.html, study the lesson, and let me know in your response what you think about this Vision.



As far as whom you would be contacting to get involved with this work, some sources I will give you, some I would like you to proactively find on your own.



For example contacting celebrities to get them to believe in WARA, and getting all their fans involved with us, as well. And then sites such as Mashable, TechCrunch, and anchors on CNN, and the CEO of Twitter and Facebook, the founders of Google and Microsoft, and politicians, from the national level down to the local level, getting them interested in RebuildingOurCities.com



So, how ambitious are you? 



How much do you *KNOW* you're the person who needs to do this work?



What makes you so sure about that?



Right now I have the money set aside for your salary for the first month, which you would receive after working for me the first 30 days. 



However, after that, each month your salary would be coming from the revenue you generate, through the assets you get selling, and through the partners you find who excitedly begin promoting my work to their audiences.



I'm looking for us to work together long-term, and for it to be more than just a job for you, because you take pride in the fact that you're transforming people's lives through this work you're doing... and that's something important to you, because you believe in the value of this work.



(If you mention something about this in your letter of interest to me, that would help you stand apart from the crowd, as well.)



Please respond right away. I'm going back to visit my family for a few weeks in a few days, so want to get the right person in place before then.



It would be best if you knew how to create pages in Optimize Press and Instabuilder; if you know how to blog, you should be fine. And if you know Fiverr and ClickBank, that might help, too.



Also if you've created ecovers, that would be a plus, as well.



Thanks,

Dan :)

title: Social Media Expert With Graphic Design Skills Inspired By Our Vision to Transform Millions of People's Lives
description:
Note: Since I initially posted this position, I hired one person. I had to let him go, because he only answered maybe one out of three questions I asked, even when I asked again for the information I needed.



And a second person I sent the contract to hire her. Except then she claimed she would need more money to do the work than the salary listed plainly right in the post.



Before you apply, make sure you've read the website you would be promoting. (About 90% of applicants did not bother to do even that.)



So show me you are sincere, serious, and would be professional, by telling me what WARA stands for, in your application. And confirm to me you would work full-time for the salary listed.



Thanks.



I appreciate you seeing whether it's you I need to be working with, if you have the inner-knowing you're exactly who I need to manifest this Destiny!



First, please see the preview page for my Kickstarter campaign which I expect to launch on Wednesday:

http://www.IBrokeTheNet.com/kickstarter/



Briefly, we're intent on getting all 320.7 million Americans focused on rebuilding the greatness in their own lives and helping other Americans rebuild the greatness in their lives - "No American left behind".



You would be playing a very important part in fulfilling that Vision.



(It's important to me that you care about doing something that truly matters, that you're not just about collecting a salary and doing the bare minimum - that you really care about Being of Service, "going the extra mile" and take pride in the work you do!)



I'm looking for someone who would feel *GREAT* knowing that he or she is doing something so profound for so many people.



Is that you?



Let's make sure it is.



Do you:

- Have experience posting on Facebook, Twitter, Google+, Instagram, Pinterest, etc, and running people's campaigns, following/friending the right people, scheduling posts - and linking a blog, YouTube and GetResponse to autopost to the social media accounts?



- Know how to use Optimize Press 2 and Instabuilder 2.0 and can take my existing YouTube videos, create blog posts embedding them in the post and send people to watch it at that page?



A big part of what you would be doing is contacting popular celebrities, mainly U.S. singers and actors, as well as politicians, mostly through Twitter (@CelebrityName) although possibly through postcards, using my SendOutCards account as a follow-up.



You would be inviting them to write a chapter for my "Rebuilding American" book and getting them to get their fan base excited about how "We Are Rebuilding America".



Do you also have good graphic design skills?



My marketing consultant wanted me to have a professional designer create more professional images on that Kickstarter page, and make it more patriotic. (He said to "red, white and blue it up". Those are the colors of the U.S. flag.)



It's also important to me to work with someone who's an excellent communicator.



You must strive to do your best with everything you're doing, and anticipate my needs, without me having to ask you for something.



(Because you know how important your job is to the work we're doing, and anytime you can save me time, making sure you're being complete in your responses, giving me everything I've requested, the more you're helping me.)



I may also ask you to submit press releases I provide to the media - it's just a form through a service I have.



And I may ask you to be the contact person for the media as they respond, requesting interviews and more information. 



That would mainly involve scheduling, and coordinating with me, as well as providing them links to articles and videos and information.



Are you confident you're the right person for the job?



If so, let me know why you are the right man or woman for the job. (Great written English is also important. It's part of "excellent communication", to me.)



Also let me know about the intangibles involved in this job description.



And what four words you use to describe yourself.

title: Senior Facebook Ads Specialist (Fitness Industry)
description:
Full-Time | Australian Clients | Long-Term Growth Opportunity



We’re looking for a senior-level
 Ads Specialist who wants more than just “running ads.”



Someone who thinks strategically.

Someone who understands business outcomes, not just CPMs.

Someone who wants to help fitness business owners grow sustainably — not chase gimmicks.



===============================================================

Who We Are

===============================================================



We’re a business coaching and growth company that helps gym owners and fitness studio owners scale through:



- Paid media (Meta-first)

- Clear growth strategy

- Systems, automations, and CRM infrastructure that buy back time



Our clients are established fitness businesses — not beginners.

And we treat their marketing with the same level of seriousness.



===============================================================

The Role (What You’ll Actually Be Responsible For)

===============================================================



This is a hands-on + thinking role, not a button-pushing position.



You’ll be responsible for owning paid media performance across multiple client accounts.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Build, manage, and optimise Meta campaigns (Awareness, Reach, Lead Generation)

- Set up and manage pixels, domain verification, CAPI basics, and custom audiences

- Work closely with our graphic designer to ensure creative quality and brand alignment

- Conduct content and market research (ads, Instagram, websites, offers, trends)

- Prepare clear weekly performance reports (numbers + insights, not fluff)

- Join client onboarding calls to gather assets, access, and campaign context

- Support our internal marketing, CRM workflows, and campaigns

- Maintain clean account structure and documentation



This role directly impacts client retention and results — it’s a position of trust and responsibility.



===============================================================

Who This Role Is For

===============================================================



You’ll thrive here if:



- You’ve already managed multiple Meta ad accounts

- You’re confident speaking to Australian business owners

- You understand how ads fit into the bigger growth system

- You care about quality, structure, and long-term performance



This is not an entry-level role.

===============================================================

Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

===============================================================



- Proven experience running
 / Meta Ads (screenshots & examples required)

- Hands-on experience with HighLevel CRM (white-label or native)

- Strong understanding of lead generation funnels

- Ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Clear, structured written communication

- Ability to work Australian business hours



Bonus Points If:



- You’ve run campaigns for Australian businesses

- You understand the fitness / health industry

- You’ve worked with agencies or coaching companies before

- You have experience with WordPress / Elementor / Envato

===============================================================

Important (Please Read Carefully)

===============================================================

We are not looking for the cheapest option.



We would rather hire one experienced, premium operator than train someone from scratch.



We value:



- Precision

- Ownership

- Strategic thinking

- Clean execution

- Professional communication



If you consider yourself a marketing unicorn — this will feel like home.

===============================================================

How to Apply (Required)

===============================================================

???? All applications must be submitted via this form:




You’ll be asked for:

- CV

- Proof of Meta Ads experience (screenshots, accounts, campaigns)

- Why you’re passionate about the fitness industry



Applications not submitted via the form will not be reviewed.

title: Inbound Sales & Dispatch Specialist
description:
Company: Staff Connect (on behalf of an Australian client)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based applicants only)

Schedule: Rotating shifts between 5:00 PM – 9:00 AM AEDT

Employment Type: Full-Time

Salary: Competitive (based on skills and experience)

Leave: 1 week paid annual leave



About the Opportunity



Our client is Australia’s leading misfuelling response company, providing nationwide emergency assistance to drivers who a
 put the wrong fuel in their vehicle.



When customers call, they’re often stressed and stranded. Your role is to confidently guide them, secure the booking, and coordinate the technician response.



This is more than a dispatcher role — it’s a structured pathway toward leadership. High performers will gradually take on operational oversight and team responsibilities, with the goal of stepping into a Sales Manager / Team Leader position.



Staff Connect is helping build the client’s first offshore team in the Philippines — this is a ground-floor opportunity with real long-term growth.



The Role



You’ll begin in an Inbound Sales & Dispatch position, managing live calls and coordinating technicians across Australia.



As you prove your reliability, sales ability, and leadership potential, you’ll be given expanded responsibilities in operations, quality control, and team support.



Core Responsibilities

Inbound Sales & Job Coordination

- Answer incoming calls from motorists requiring urgent assistance

- Convert enquiries into confirmed bookings using empathy and confidence

- Coordinate nationwide technicians via scheduling platforms

- Secure deposits and accurately log all job details

- Manage cases from first contact through job completion

- Communicate via phone, Gmail, Slack, SMS, and booking systems



Operations & Quality Oversight

- Review previous day’s jobs for accuracy and completion

- Identify and correct unclosed or incorrectly logged jobs

- Ensure jobs are properly transferred to Xero and GeoOp



Monitor call logs for:

- Correct objection tagging

- Accurate ETAs and timestamps

- Proper discount logging

- Missed sales opportunities



- Assist in managing long fleet-related calls for PO numbers

- Track spill kit usage and upload relevant invoices in Xero (creation only)

- Act as a quality control layer to prevent operational errors



Process & Admin Support

- Update internal fleet documents using new templates

- Assist with SOP improvements and documentation updates

- Support onboarding and training initiatives as the team expands



Customer Escalation & Tech Coordination

- Manage escalated customer calls professionally

- Coordinate servo runs and tech card runs

- Participate in Slack huddles (camera-on when required)

- Be an active contributor during live team support sessions



Ideal Candidate

- At least 2 years’ experience in sales, dispatch, or call centre roles

- Strong track record of converting inbound enquiries

- Excellent English communication (written and spoken)

- Calm and composed under pressure

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail

- Confident using Google Workspace, Gmail, and Chrome

- Comfortable with Slack and video calls

- Reliable home setup with stable internet



Highly Regarded:

- Automotive or roadside assistance experience

- Knowledge of Australian geography
