title: Client Care & Operations Coordinator — Real Estate Media Company (USA)
description:
We are one of Colorado's well-established real estate media companies, providing photography, video, and content production for real estate professionals and businesses across the state. We've built a strong reputation over the years and we're growing. We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. 



We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us, take on real responsibility, and become a key part of how this company runs for years to come.



**The Role**

You'll be the operational backbone of our client experience. You are the person who keeps schedules tight, clients informed, and the team moving without friction. This isn't a task-ticker role. We want someone who thinks ahead, communicates with genuine warmth, and takes ownership of what they manage.



Your day-to-day will include:



• Managing client scheduling and shoot coordination

• Handling client care calls, follow-ups, confirmations, and resolving concerns professionally

• Processing and entering online orders accurately

• Communicating revisions between clients and the internal production team

• Maintaining CRM records and keeping task systems up to date

• Keeping inboxes organized and deadlines on track so nothing slips

• Identifying inefficiencies and helping improve the systems around them



You are the person who prevents small issues from becoming big problems.



**Tools You'll Use**

• Aryeo (preferred, scheduling and delivery platform)

• 
 (required, how we track every job and task)

• RingCentral (preferred, all client phone communication runs through this)

• Slack, internal team communication

• Dropbox, file management and delivery

• CRM systems, client records and follow-up tracking

• Zapier and basic automation tools, workflow automation experience is a plus



**What We're Looking For**

This role is equal parts operational precision and genuine people skills. The right person is warm on the phone, sharp with details, and steady when things get busy.



You'll thrive here if you:

• Speak and write English fluently and naturally, clients will hear you, not just read you

• Have a warm, professional phone presence that builds real client relationships

• Are organized, consistent, and follow through without being reminded

• Stay calm and solution-focused when priorities shift

• Take pride in systems running smoothly and improve them when they don't

• Can be warm with clients and firm when needed

• Don't need constant direction to get things done



Familiarity with real estate photography or media production workflows is a meaningful bonus, but your communication skills, reliability, and work ethic matter most.



**This Role Is NOT For You If:**

• You prefer behind-the-scenes work with little to no client contact

• You avoid phone calls or are uncomfortable with spoken client communication

• You struggle with follow-through or lose track of details under pressure

• You need frequent reminders or close supervision to stay on track

• You've jumped between many short-term roles without a clear reason



**What Success Looks Like**

• Clients feel informed, cared for, and confident in our company

• The team shows up to shoots prepared and on time

• Schedules run without last-minute surprises

• The inbox stays organized and nothing gets missed

• Problems get solved before they escalate



**Compensation and Benefits**

Starting at $7.00/hour | Full-Time | Long-Term Position

Monday through Friday | 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM Mountain Time (USA)



We believe in paying people what they're worth. Compensation is based on experience and what you bring to the role and it grows as you do.



Pay and Schedule

• Paid every two weeks on a consistent schedule

• $20/month internet and equipment stipend to support your home office setup

• Compensation reviewed at 90 days, strong performance is recognized quickly

• Annual pay review, loyalty and consistency are rewarded here



Time Off and Holidays

• 12 paid holidays per year, your choice which ones to take (we trust you to pick what matters most to your family and culture)

• Additional paid time off added for each year you stay with the company, the longer you're here, the more you earn

• 13th month pay honored annually (we understand and respect Filipino employment standards)



Growth and Stability

• This is not a short-term contract. We are building a team, not filling a seat. The right person will be with us for years



Culture and How We Work

• Structured onboarding, your first several weeks are carefully planned so you're set up to succeed, not thrown in the deep end

• Regular check-ins and direct feedback, you'll always know how you're doing and what's expected. No guessing games

• You'll work directly with the business owner, decisions get made quickly, communication is direct, and your contributions are visible and valued

• We are a small, established team, what you do here matters and is noticed



We don't hire and churn. We've built a solid reputation in Colorado over the years and we're looking for someone who wants to be part of where we're going, not just where we are.



**To Apply**

Send an
 with your resume attached as a PDF and answer the following two questions in the body of your
.



1. List each tool from our requirements that you have used and briefly describe how you used it. Be specific. Also tell us how you typically go about learning a new tool or improving your skills with one you already use.



2. A client
s saying they are unhappy with how a recent interaction was handled. They are not asking for anything specific but they are clearly frustrated. Write the response you would send.



Somewhere in your
, tell us your favorite type of weather. Do not explain why, just mention it naturally. This tells us you read carefully.



**Video Submission**

Record a 1 to 3 minute unedited, single-take video and include the link in your
. Upload to Google Drive, Dropbox, or YouTube unlisted. Do not read from a script, just speak naturally. Your phone is fine.



In your video, cover the following:



1. Introduce yourself and tell us how long you have been doing administrative or client facing work.



2. Describe a time you handled a frustrated or difficult client. What did you say and how did it end?



3. How do you make sure nothing falls through the cracks during a busy week? Walk us through your actual system.



4. What do you know about real estate photography or media production, even generally?



5. Why are you the right person for this role?



6. Somewhere in your video, tell us your favorite meal. Do not explain why, just mention it naturally. This tells us you watched all the way through.



Applications without a PDF resume,
 answers, and video link will not be reviewed.

title: Lead Generation Specialist (B2B | HubSpot | Architects & Designers)
description:
TYPE OF WORK:

Part time to start with options for fulltime (20-40 hrs/week).



SALARY:

$8-$15

(We pay for experience. Please apply only if you have real B2B lead gen results.)



ROLE OVERVIEW:

This is NOT basic list-building.

You will own: (1) lead sourcing + contact discovery, (2) HubSpot CRM data quality, and (3) outbound sequences + optimization.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

1) Lead sourcing (AEC/design audiences)

- Build curated target lists: architecture firms, interior designers, lighting designers, specifiers, design-build.

- Follow our ICP filters and keep a clean suppression list (do-not-contact).



2) Contact discovery + verification

- Find decision-makers and verify
 accuracy.

- Maintain a quality-first standard (no spam lists, no low-confidence
s).



3) HubSpot CRM data entry + hygiene

- Create and update Company + Contact records in HubSpot.

- Maintain clean properties, minimize duplicates, and ensure completeness.



4) Outbound
 sequences + A/B testing (HubSpot)

- Build and run sequences in HubSpot.

- A/B test subject lines and messaging, analyze results, and iterate.



5) Reporting

- Weekly reporting: leads created, sequence performance, replies, meetings booked, what you’re changing next.



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE / SKILLS (NON-NEGOTIABLE):

- 4+ years of B2B lead generation experience (SDR / outbound / appointment setting / lead gen)

- HubSpot expert (CRM + Sequences + lists + reporting + data hygiene)

- Strong cold
 writing + personalization

- LinkedIn Sales Navigator proficiency

- Detail-oriented data hygiene: accurate entry, low duplicates, clean formatting

- Professional English writing (clear, concise, error-free)



PREFERRED:

- Experience targeting architects / interior designers / lighting designers / construction / complex B2B industries

- Portfolio or case studies showing results (reply rates, meetings booked, pipeline contribution)

- Experience with A/B testing and reporting dashboards



GUARDRAILS (NON-NEGOTIABLE):

- Must follow privacy and anti-spam requirements (unsubscribe handling, consent standards).

- No prohibited scraping, no buying/leaking databases, no spam blasting.

- Quality over volume. We measure outcomes and accuracy.



KPIs (WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE):

- 60–120 verified leads/week once ramped (with correct titles + verified contact info)

- CRM accuracy and completeness ? 98%

- Consistent improvement of sequence performance (opens/clicks/replies/meetings booked)

- Clear weekly reporting with insights and next actions



HOW TO APPLY:

Please submit:

1) Your resume and a short cover note

2) Links to any case studies or proof of results

3) Answers to the screening questions below



SCREENING QUESTIONS (REQUIRED):

1) How many years of B2B lead generation experience do you have? Which industries?

2) Describe your HubSpot experience (CRM + Sequences). What did you do weekly?

3) What is your process to verify
s and reduce bounces?

4) Write a 5–7 sentence mini-plan: how would you target architects vs interior designers vs lighting designers?

5) Share 1–2 examples of measurable results you’ve achieved.



APPLICANT SUBJECT LINE (pick ONE of these exactly):

Option A: KARICE – Lead Gen Specialist – HubSpot Expert

Option B: KARICE – AEC Lead Gen – Case Study Attached

Option C: KARICE – Outbound + HubSpot – Ready to Start



Thank you

title: Lead Manager
description:
We are looking for a results-driven Lead Manager to oversee and optimize our lead generation efforts. This role is responsible for managing lead flow, qualifying prospects, and ensuring a consistent pipeline for our sales team.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage and track incoming leads from various channels (cold calling, SMS,
, ads, etc.)

Qualify leads based on company criteria and readiness

Assign qualified leads to sales agents or acquisition team

Monitor KPIs such as conversion rates, response time, and lead quality

Maintain and update CRM systems with accurate lead information

Coordinate with marketing and sales teams to improve lead generation strategies

Train and manage lead managers or VAs if needed



Requirements:

Proven experience in lead generation, lead management, or similar role

Strong understanding of CRM systems 

Excellent communication and organizational skills

Ability to analyze data and improve performance metrics

title: Lead UI/UX Designer – EduTrack
description:
About EduTrack

EduTrack is a growing EdTech platform focused on building smart, intuitive systems for schools and therapy-based organizations. Our mission is to create powerful tools that actually make life easier for administrators, educators, and clinicians.

We are looking for a Lead UI/UX Designer to take full ownership of the user experience and interface design across the platform.



Role Overview

As the Lead UI/UX Designer, you will own the entire UI/UX function of EduTrack. You will be responsible for translating real user needs into intuitive, clean, and scalable product designs. This is a key leadership role with real influence on product direction.

You will work closely with product, development, and leadership to shape how EduTrack looks, feels, and works.



Key Responsibilities

* Own and lead all UI/UX design for the EduTrack platform

* Deeply understand and analyze end-user needs (administrators, educators, therapists, parents, etc.)

* Translate complex workflows into simple, intuitive user experiences

* Design wireframes, user flows, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI designs

* Maintain and evolve the design system and product consistency

* Collaborate with developers to ensure accurate implementation

* Continuously improve UX based on feedback and real usage



Requirements

* Minimum 2+ years experience as a Lead / Senior UI/UX Designer

* Proven experience owning UI/UX projects end-to-end

* Very strong proficiency in Figma (must be expert level)

* Strong understanding of UX research, user journeys, and usability principles

* Experience working on complex systems (SaaS / dashboards / admin systems is a big plus)

* Ability to think both strategically and practically

* Strong communication and leadership skills



Nice to Have (Bonus)

* Experience in EdTech, HealthTech, or workflow-heavy systems

* Experience building design systems from scratch

* Understanding of accessibility and usability standards



What Makes This Role Special

* You are not “just a designer” — you own the product experience

* Real influence on a growing platform used by real organizations

* Opportunity to build something from the ground up

* Work directly with leadership and product vision



How to Apply

* Subject Line: Application for UI/UX Designer

* Attach your resume and links to project examples (must include SaaS and/or admin UI examples)

* Include your
 and onlinejobs.ph profile

* Mention your desired hourly salary range

* Send applications to:

title: Customer Support Experts Needed
description:
We are now hiring Customer Support Experts to assist our customers over the phone.

This is a full-time position only with long-term potential



Customers will call us and ask for assistance with various tasks, such as:



Checking their email accounts

Purchasing items they need

Signing up for services

Logging into or managing their accounts

Checking or signing up for credit score reports

Conducting general online searches



The tasks we handle are all things that can be done online.



PAY & EARNING STRUCTURE



Base rate starts at $4.50 per hour.

Agents usually work 10 hours per day including the paid breaks, and we allow more hours if someone wants to earn more.

During busy times, we also pay time-and-a-half overtime when we need additional coverage.

Good performers can earn a monthly bonus between $60 and $150.

There is a $50 monthly attendance bonus for consistent on-time performance.

Every 6 months, we evaluate performance and agents can receive up to an extra $0.50 per hour added to their rate if they are doing well.



With base hours plus bonuses and performance increases, a strong performer can earn up to around $1,100 per month.



This is the roadmap of our hiring process:



- You will take a quiz that typically takes about an hour to complete.

- If you pass the quiz, you will be invited to take two live mock calls or skill tests. The first one usually takes around 20 minutes, and the second one is longer, typically about an hour.

- Once you pass, you will then proceed with orientation and training.



Please note that our quizzes and skill tests can be challenging for beginners and require sharpness, speed and excellent attention to details. If you believe you possess these skills, feel free to apply.



You need to have fluent English as well as having very good internet connection and a quiet place to work.

Please apply only if you are fully available for a full-time position.

Please do not apply if you are not based in the Philippines.



When You Apply*



Please answer the following questions:



1. How many hours are you available daily, and on which days of the week?

2. How soon are you ready to start?



Lastly, please include a link to a Vocaroo audio recording (minimum 45 seconds) where you briefly introduce yourself. Tell us a bit about your background, relevant experience, and one hobby you genuinely enjoy.



Thanks,

Aron

title: Accounts/Sales Manager
description:
CalabiTek Inc is a fast-growing consulting firm specializing in digital transformation, custom software development, IT consulting, and staff augmentation. With over 6 years of industry experience, we pride ourselves on delivering tailored solutions that empower businesses to achieve their goals. At CalabiTek, we firmly believe that human capital is the most valuable asset, and we are dedicated to fostering long-term partnerships with our clients by providing exceptional service and results-driven solutions.   

Job Description: We are seeking an experienced Accounts/Sales Manager to join our dynamic team in Carrollton, TX. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying and acquiring new clients, managing existing accounts, and driving revenue growth by offering our specialized consulting and digital solutions.   Key Job Duties of an Account/Sales Manager:   1. Client Acquisition & Business Development: Identify and target potential clients through market research, networking, and outreach. Develop and execute strategies to onboard new clients by offering tailored consulting services. Build a strong sales pipeline by attending industry events, leveraging referrals, and reaching out to prospects. Prepare and deliver compelling presentations and proposals to prospective clients. Negotiate contracts and close deals to achieve revenue and growth targets.   2. Relationship Management & Client Retention: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients and ensure their needs are met. Build long-term, trust-based relationships with clients by understanding their business goals and challenges. Regularly engage with clients to identify opportunities for additional services or consulting engagements. Ensure client satisfaction by addressing concerns, resolving issues, and providing timely updates. Conduct regular follow-ups and review meetings to maintain a healthy relationship.   3. Strategic Planning & Market Analysis: Develop and implement sales strategies aligned with company goals. Monitor industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging market needs to identify new business opportunities. Work closely with leadership to refine service offerings and develop value propositions tailored to client needs. Identify new sectors or industries where consulting services can be expanded.   4. Proposal Development & Solution Selling: Collaborate with technical and delivery teams to understand service capabilities and craft customized solutions. Lead the proposal development process, including writing RFPs, RFIs, and SOWs (Statements of Work). Present solutions that highlight the consulting firm’s expertise and ROI for the client. Use consultative selling techniques to align the firm’s services with client business objectives.   5. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Coordinate with internal teams (delivery, operations, marketing, and finance) to ensure seamless onboarding and project execution for new clients. Ensure smooth handover from sales to delivery teams once a contract is signed. Work with marketing to create promotional materials, case studies, and success stories to attract new clients.   6. Revenue Growth & Account Expansion: Manage and grow existing client accounts by identifying opportunities for cross-selling and upselling additional services. Track and achieve sales targets, including revenue, profitability, and account growth metrics. Foster strategic partnerships with key accounts to create long-term value. Identify potential joint ventures or partnerships that can enhance service offerings.   7. Reporting & Metrics: Maintain accurate records of sales activities, pipeline status, and client interactions in CRM systems. Prepare regular reports on sales performance, revenue forecasts, and client feedback for senior management. Analyze key metrics to assess the effectiveness of sales strategies and make data-driven decisions.   8. Contract Management & Compliance: Negotiate terms and conditions of contracts, ensuring alignment with company policies. Ensure all contractual obligations are met and documented. Maintain compliance with client agreements and industry regulations.   9. Continuous Learning & Improvement: Stay updated on consulting industry trends, competitor offerings, and best practices in sales and account management. Continuously improve sales techniques and consulting knowledge to better serve clients. Provide feedback to leadership on potential service enhancements or new market needs. Soft Skills Required: Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills Ability to build and maintain trust-based client relationships Consultative approach to problem-solving Results-driven mindset with a focus on achieving revenue targets Adaptability and ability to manage multiple priorities

title: Lending Operations Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)
description:
Lending Operations Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)





Alpha Capital | Remote (Full-Time, Virtual)



Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST



Compensation: $800/month



About Alpha Capital





Alpha Capital is a rapidly growing, vertically integrated real estate investment firm based in Connecticut. We operate across acquisitions, lending, brokerage, and property management, with a focus on scaling to 10,000+ units and building a best-in-class real estate platform.



Our lending division is expanding quickly, and we are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Lending Operations Coordinator to support our team and bring structure, accuracy, and accountability to our pipeline.



This is not just a task-based VA role — this is a critical operations position with real responsibility and room to grow.



Why This Role Exists

As our lending volume grows, our team needs to stay focused on originating and closing deals — not getting slowed down by administrative work.



This role exists to:

Keep the pipeline accurate and up to date

Ensure deals are moving forward efficiently

Track performance and key metrics

Handle day-to-day operational coordination







You will be the operational backbone of the lending team.



Key Responsibilities

1. Pipeline & CRM Management

Maintain and update all deals in CRM (Salesforce/HubSpot)



Ensure every deal is in the correct stage with accurate data



Monitor pipeline movement and follow up on stalled deals



Keep pipeline clean, organized, and updated daily



2. Commission Tracking & Invoicing

Track all funded deals and calculate commissions



Prepare and send commission reports



Coordinate payouts with internal accounting team



Maintain organized commission and payment records



3. KPI Tracking & Reporting

Track weekly and monthly metrics, including:



Applications submitted



Deals in pipeline



Funded volume



Conversion rates



Prepare and send weekly performance reports to leadership



4. Document & File Coordination

Collect required documents from borrowers



Organize and maintain deal files



Ensure files are complete before processing/underwriting



Send document checklists and follow-ups



5. Follow-Up & Deal Coordination

Follow up with borrowers for missing items



Coordinate with lenders on deal status



Track timelines and ensure deals are progressing



Proactively identify and prevent delays



6. Administrative Support

Assist with scheduling calls and meetings

title: Digital Ads Manager — Automotive (Google, Meta, TikTok)
description:
Full-Time  |  Remote  |  USA-Based Creative Marketing Agency



$1,500–$2,000 USD/month



Most ad managers place campaigns. You’ll place incredible creative — cinematic video, professional photography, and polished design — in front of the exact right audience for automotive dealerships across the US. If you love the craft of paid media and want to work with creative that actually deserves a great media strategy, keep reading.





ABOUT US

We’re a full-service creative marketing agency based in the US. We produce premium creative — cinematic video, professional photography, and beautiful graphic design — for clients across automotive, home services, financial, legal, construction, non-profit, and other industries. Our automotive clients include new car franchise dealerships.



This role exists because our clients invest heavily in standout creative, and they need someone skilled enough to put that work in front of the right audience at the right time. That’s what you’ll do every day.





WHAT YOU'LL DO

You’ll work full-time as our Digital Ads Manager, reporting directly to our Paid Media Manager. This is a hands-on execution role — you’ll be inside ad platforms every day building campaigns, optimizing performance, pulling reports, and managing creative assets across Meta, Google, and TikTok for multiple clients simultaneously.



Automotive dealership experience is essential. You need direct, hands-on experience running paid ads for new car franchise dealerships — including Vehicle Listing Ads (VLAs/Google Vehicle Ads), TikTok Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs), Performance Max campaigns, and dealer-specific tools like vAuto (inventory feeds for Meta catalog ads), 
, VinSolutions, and DealerSocket.



We also value people who use AI and automation as a force multiplier — building custom workflows, automating reporting, or using intelligent tools to move faster and make better decisions. We’re not interested in someone who pastes prompts into ChatGPT and calls it strategy. We want someone who understands the platforms deeply and uses AI to amplify that expertise.





WORK SCHEDULE

Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Central Time (CST). We need real-time overlap with our team and clients, so this schedule is firm.



Commitment: This is a full-time, exclusive position — 40 hours per week dedicated to our agency. We use proprietary time-tracking software where you log hours by client throughout the day. If you’re currently working with other clients and aren’t ready to go all-in with one team, this probably isn’t the right fit.





DAY-TO-DAY RESPONSIBILITIES

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

• Build, launch, and optimize campaigns in Meta Ads Manager daily across multiple client accounts

• Manage Advantage+ Shopping campaigns and catalog-based Automotive Inventory Ads using feeds from vAuto and similar inventory providers

• Ensure proper creative placement formatting — vertical assets in vertical placements (Stories, Reels), horizontal in horizontal placements (Feed, In-Stream). Getting this right every time matters to us.

• Modify PSD creative files for ad placements and device dimensions

• Implement and troubleshoot Meta Pixel, Conversions API, and event tracking



Google Ads

• Set up and manage Search, Display, YouTube, and Vehicle Listing Ad (VLA) campaigns

• Build and optimize Performance Max campaigns, including automotive-specific inventory feeds

• Connect dealer inventory feeds (vAuto, dealer DMS exports) to Google Merchant Center for VLA campaigns

• Set up and manage conversion tracking via Google Tag Manager and GA4

• Manage bid strategies, negative keyword lists, and audience segments



TikTok Ads

• Build and manage campaigns in TikTok Ads Manager for lead generation and awareness objectives

• Set up and manage TikTok Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs) — including inventory feed integration, catalog setup, and dynamic creative optimization

• Install and troubleshoot TikTok Pixel and Events API

• Ensure vertical-first creative formatting for all TikTok placements



Reporting, Creative Placement & Platforms

• Compile weekly and monthly ad spend and performance reports across all platforms

• Work within vAuto, 
, VinSolutions, and DealerSocket platforms as needed for automotive clients

• Receive finished creative from our production team and place it correctly across all ad platforms — right format, right dimensions, right placement

• Upload final video assets to YouTube with accurate metadata, descriptions, and tags

• Schedule and boost social media posts; track engagement and adjust as needed





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

1. Minimum 2 years managing paid ad campaigns for new car franchise dealerships (not used cars only, not general automotive)

2. Direct experience setting up Google Vehicle Listing Ads (VLAs) with inventory feed integration

3. Experience with TikTok Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs) or strong willingness to learn quickly with guidance

4. Proficiency in Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads Manager

5. Working familiarity with vAuto and at least one of: 
, VinSolutions, or DealerSocket

6. Google Tag Manager and GA4 setup experience

7. Adobe Photoshop skills for modifying PSD ad creative files

8. Sharp attention to detail on creative placement — correct aspect ratios for every placement type, every time

9. Strong written English (you’ll communicate with our US-based team daily)

10. Reliable internet (minimum 25 Mbps) with a backup power/internet solution

11. Willingness to use our proprietary time-tracking software during all working hours, logging by client



BONUS POINTS

• Google Ads certification (Search, Display, or Video)

• Meta Blueprint certification

• Experience with automotive CRM platforms (CDK Global, Reynolds & Reynolds)

• Experience with Looker Studio or Data Studio for automated reporting

• Experience building custom automations, AI agents, scripts, or workflows that improve ad operations — e.g., automated reporting pipelines, bulk campaign management tools, custom GPTs for ad analysis, or any tool you built yourself to work smarter



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

• Salary: $1,500–$2000 USD/month depending on experience, paid twice monthly (15th and 30th)

• Stability: This is a long-term position. We’re not looking for a contractor to fill a 3-month gap — we want someone to grow with us.

• Mentorship: You’ll work directly under our Paid Media Manager, who will train you on our workflows, share strategy context, and invest in your development.

• Premium creative: You won’t be placing stock photos and Canva templates. Our production team creates cinematic video and professional photography — your job is to make sure that work performs.

• Time off: Paid Philippine holidays.





HOW TO APPLY

We get a lot of applications for roles like this, so we use the questions below to find people with real experience. Take your time with them — thoughtful answers are what move you to the top of the list.



Answer all 5 questions in your application message:



1. Name one specific new car dealership you’ve managed paid ads for. What OEM brand(s) did they sell? What was their approximate monthly ad budget across all platforms? How long did you manage their account? (We will verify this.)



2. You log into a dealer’s Meta Ads account on Monday morning and see that weekend spend was 3x the daily budget across all campaigns, but lead volume didn’t increase proportionally. Walk us through exactly what you’d check and in what order. Be specific about which screens, tabs, and breakdowns you’d look at inside Ads Manager.



3. What time zone are you in right now? Confirm that you can work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Standard Time, Monday through Friday. If this means working night hours for you, tell us what those hours would be in your local time and whether you’ve done overnight shift work before (and for how long).



4. Are you currently working for any other employer, client, or freelance project? If yes, list each one and confirm you’ll end those engagements before your start date. If no, when did your last engagement end and why?



5. Have you built or used any AI tools, automations, scripts, or custom workflows to improve how you manage ad campaigns? If yes, pick one and walk us through it: what does it do, how did you set it up, and how much time or effort does it save you? If you haven’t done this yet, just say so — it won’t count against you.



One last thing: at the end of your application, after all 5 answers, tell us the name of a restaurant near your home that you’d recommend and what you’d order there. That’s it. We just want to know you read the whole posting.

title: Accounting Manager
description:
Note: This role is a direct hire by the company, not through an agency. Immediate hiring need.





ABOUT VALUE FUSION



Value Fusion is a boutique advisory firm specializing in financial operations and business strategy for ABA therapy and behavioral health practices across the United States. Founded by David Newberry (Goldman Sachs, Moelis & Company) and Jing Zhou (BCBA, CEPA), we help practice owners achieve financial clarity, operational efficiency, and sustainable long-term growth -- from day-to-day accounting to exit planning.



Given Value Fusion's current growth, there is an immediate need for this position. As we scale our client base, we are looking for a sharp, client-ready Accounting Manager to be the operational backbone of our financial services delivery.





POSITION OVERVIEW



Position: Accounting Manager

Position Location: Virtual / Remote

Reports to: CEO and Founder Dave Newberry

Hours per week: 40 hours

Compensation: $14-20/hour, commensurate with experience

Timezone: M-F, 9-5pm US Central Time (Chicago Time)

Payment through Wise





THE ROLE



This is a high-visibility, full-time remote role supporting a growing portfolio of ABA behavioral health clients. You will own the end-to-end accounting function for multiple clients -- from onboarding and system setup through ongoing bookkeeping, reporting, and strategic insight delivery. You will work directly with Value Fusion leadership and interface regularly with client stakeholders, so both technical excellence and polished communication are essential.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Client Onboarding and Transitions

* Lead the full client onboarding process: draft and send initial welcome communications, facilitate discovery meetings, and set up accounting workflows

* Gain access to and audit clients' existing accounting systems (QuickBooks Online/Desktop) and practice management systems

* Execute smooth transitions from prior accountants or in-house accounting functions to Value Fusion, including historical data cleanup and chart of accounts restructuring



Ongoing Accounting Management

* Maintain accurate, timely books for multiple ABA practice clients in QuickBooks

* Perform month-end close, reconciliations, and accounting cleanup as needed

* Identify and resolve discrepancies, coding errors, and legacy accounting issues



Reporting and Client Communication

* Prepare monthly financial packages (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow) tailored to each client

* Deliver high-level financial insights and commentary -- not just numbers, but meaningful analysis that helps owners make decisions

* Communicate proactively and professionally with clients via
, video calls, and written reports; represent Value Fusion with polish and confidence



Systems, Workflows, and AI Tools

* Manage and improve internal accounting workflows and project tracking processes

* Leverage AI tools and automation (including MCP integrations) to increase efficiency and reduce manual work

* Stay current on emerging accounting technologies and propose improvements to our service delivery model





QUALIFICATIONS



Required

* 3 to 7 years of accounting or bookkeeping experience, ideally in a multi-client or outsourced accounting environment

* Strong QuickBooks proficiency (Online and/or Desktop) -- you can clean up a messy set of books and build solid financial reports from scratch

* Excellent written and spoken English -- you are comfortable leading client calls and writing executive-level summaries

* Proven ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously with strong attention to detail and deadlines

* Comfortable working independently in a remote setting with minimal oversight



Strongly Preferred

* Experience in healthcare, behavioral health, or therapy practice accounting

* Exposure to AI tools, workflow automation, or MCP integrations in an accounting context

* Experience supporting client transitions from one accounting system or provider to another

* Familiarity with U.S.-based accounting standards and financial reporting





APPLICATION & INTERVIEW PROCESS



* Google Forms application form: Apply with your resume and video intro link here: 
 

* Round 1 (R1) Interview (20 minutes)

* R2 Interview, if needed

* R3 Interview

* Offer



Standard Note: This interview process is being conducted, in part, by Sea Link Ventures (SLV), a partner company of Value Fusion, if you see
s from the SLV domain. SLV is not an agency and receives no commission. You will be directly employed by Value Fusion. 




 | ABA Behavioral Health Advisory and Financial Services

title: Industrial/Product Designer for Consumer Products - Full Time, Remote
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly creative Industrial Designer based in the Philippines to help define and evolve the visual identity of our product portfolio across high-end hair tools and power/home improvement tools.

This role focuses on product form, brand expression, CMF, and user experience. You will translate brand strategy into iconic, emotionally compelling physical products that stand out in competitive global markets.

From premium hair dryers to precision power tools, you will shape a cohesive and recognizable design language that defines who we are — while working closely with our product development team to ensure your vision is thoughtfully executed.

?

description:
We are seeking an Accounting Associate who will support our fractional CFO team in providing high-quality accounting services to our clients. This role works directly with our CFOs and accounting leads to maintain and improve our clients’ accounting systems and financial processes.



This is a client-facing role. While the position begins as an Accounting Associate, the intention is for the successful candidate to grow into a Lead Accountant role within approximately six months.



Our firm provides outsourced accounting and finance services to growing businesses. We support clients with bookkeeping, financial reporting, accounts receivable, accounts payable, accounting operations, and payroll accounting.

The ideal candidate is comfortable stepping into unfamiliar accounting environments, assessing existing processes, identifying opportunities for improvement, and helping implement better systems.



Core Responsibilities:

Client Accounting Support

Maintain and improve client accounting records

Assist with monthly close processes

Prepare journal entries and reconciliations

Maintain revenue recognition and deferred revenue schedules

Support inventory and cost accounting

Manage accounts receivable and accounts payable workflows

Support financial reporting for client leadership and CFOs



Accounting Diagnostics & Improvement

- Review existing accounting records and identify inconsistencies or areas needing improvement

- Investigate unusual balances or discrepancies in the general ledger

- Help implement improved accounting processes and workflows

- Work with CFOs to improve monthly close efficiency and financial reporting reliability



Client Communication

- Communicate with clients via
 and occasionally in meetings

- Explain accounting questions or issues clearly to non-accounting stakeholders

- Gather information from clients to resolve accounting questions





Internal Collaboration

- Coordinate with accounting associates and leads to ensure work is properly prioritized

- Manage deadlines around client reporting and meetings

- Escalate issues when necessary while maintaining ownership of tasks





What Success Looks Like

Within the first six months, successful candidates will:

Confidently take ownership of client accounting workflows

Diagnose accounting issues in unfamiliar books

Contribute to improving client accounting processes

Communicate effectively with both clients and internal teams

Demonstrate readiness to grow into a Lead Accountant role





Key Traits We Value

Agency - You take initiative and move work forward without needing constant direction. You know when to solve problems independently and when to escalate.

Integrity - We operate with a high level of trust. You are transparent about challenges and take ownership of your work.

Kindness - We work collaboratively and support one another. Strong interpersonal skills and a respectful attitude are essential.



Qualifications:

Required:

3+ years of accounting experience

Strong understanding of general ledger accounting

Experience with month-end close processes

Experience with revenue recognition and balance sheet reconciliations

Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

Ability to explain accounting concepts clearly in writing



Preferred:

Experience working with multiple clients or business units

Experience cleaning up or inheriting existing accounting systems

Experience with inventory & cost accounting

Experience supporting CFOs or financial leadership

CPA or CPA-track (not required)





The Type of Person Who Thrives Here

This role is well suited for someone who:

Enjoys solving messy accounting problems

Is comfortable working across multiple businesses and industries

Communicates clearly with both accountants and business operators

Wants to grow into a leadership role

Takes pride in improving systems and processes

title: Logistics Specialist
description:
LOGISTICS SPECIALIST

Remote  |  Full-Time  |  $4–$6 USD/hour

Location: Fully Remote 

Schedule: 5 Days/Week + Optional 6th Day 

Pay Rate: $4–$6 USD/hour 

Language: English (Fluent)



ABOUT THE COMPANY



Same Day Air Corp is a US-based time-critical logistics company specializing in same-day air cargo, expedited freight, and last-mile delivery solutions. We serve clients across multiple industries and operate with carriers and contractors throughout North America and beyond. We pride ourselves on speed, reliability, and exceptional customer communication.



ROLE OVERVIEW



We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Logistics Specialist to join our operations team remotely. This is a training-forward role — the right candidate does not need prior freight or logistics experience. We will provide full training on our systems, workflows, and industry terminology. What we need is someone with excellent English communication skills, sharp attention to detail, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, time-sensitive environment.



Important note on schedule: This role operates on a night shift — 11:00 PM to 7:00 AM Central Time (CT). For candidates based in the Philippines, this translates to approximately 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM Philippine Standard Time (PST) — a regular daytime schedule. The position is 5 days per week, and at least one of those days must be a Saturday or Sunday. Candidates who are not available on weekends will not be considered. An optional 6th day is available for agents who want to earn additional income — agents who take the extra day will always retain at least one weekend day off.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Monitor and coordinate time-critical shipments and provide real-time status updates to clients

• Communicate professionally with customers, carriers, and contractors via
 and phone

• Assist with driver dispatching, scheduling, and breakdown coordination

• Process and manage shipping documentation including AWBs, BOLs, and PODs

• Enter and track job information accurately in our internal systems

• Follow up on shipment exceptions and escalate issues to the operations supervisor

• Support the team with administrative logistics tasks as needed



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



• Fluent, professional English — both written and spoken (this is non-negotiable)

• Strong attention to detail and excellent organizational skills

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional remote work environment

• Availability to work overnight hours: 11:00 PM – 7:00 AM Central Time (CT) — for Philippines-based candidates this is approximately 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM PST (daytime shift)

• Schedule is 5 days per week — candidates must be available to cover at least one weekend day (Saturday or Sunday). This is a firm requirement and non-negotiable

• Optional 6th day available for agents who wish to earn extra income — you will always retain at least one weekend day off regardless of whether you take the additional day

• Fast learner who is coachable and takes initiative

• Calm, professional demeanor under pressure — logistics moves fast

• Prior experience in logistics, freight, or customer service is a plus, but not required



WHAT WE OFFER



• Full training provided — we will teach you everything you need to know

• Stable, long-term remote position with a US-based company

• Competitive pay of $4–$6 USD/hour based on experience and skill level

• Supportive team environment with direct access to experienced operations staff

• Opportunity to grow within the company as skills develop



HOW TO APPLY



To apply, please send the following to: 



• Your resume or CV (in English)

• A brief cover letter telling us about yourself and why you are interested in this role

• A short writing sample — please write 3–5 sentences describing how you would handle the following situation:



"A customer calls asking for an update on their shipment. You check the system and see that the flight was delayed by 3 hours. How do you communicate this to the customer?"



Candidates who pass the initial review will be invited to a short paid trial task before a final hiring decision is made.



Same Day Air Corp is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds.

title: Commission Phone Rep — Warm Leads — Free Youth Sports Program USA
description:
We are SoCal Basketball Club, a free youth basketball program based in Anaheim, California. We generate 100+ warm inbound leads every week from
 advertising — parents who already filled out a form asking about our program for their child. We need reliable commission-based phone representatives to follow up with these leads and confirm they are coming this Saturday.

This is not cold calling. Every parent already expressed interest. Your job is simple — call them within 5 minutes of receiving the lead, have a warm friendly conversation, answer basic questions, and get them committed to showing up Saturday.

The program is completely free for kids. Zero monthly fees. No tryouts. Real coaches, certified referees, real games every Saturday in Anaheim California. It is the easiest conversation you will ever have because there is nothing to sell — it is free.

How it works:

You will have access to a live shared Google Sheet that updates in real time as new leads come in throughout the day. You claim a lead by putting your name next to it and call immediately. You log your outcome after every call. Our team verifies shows every Saturday and pays commission weekly via PayPal or Wise.

What you will do:

Monitor the Google Sheet during US Pacific Time hours — mornings, afternoons, and evenings. Call every lead you claim within 5 minutes of claiming it. Have a natural warm conversation with the parent. Confirm they are bringing their child this Saturday. Log all call outcomes in the sheet.

Pay:

$50 USD commission for every parent who shows up Saturday and registers their child. No show — no pay. 100+ leads available every week. Realistic earnings at 10% conversion rate — $500 USD per week. Strong performers at 20% conversion — $1,000 USD per week. Paid weekly via PayPal or Wise.

Requirements:

Excellent English communication skills — must be clear and easy to understand on the phone. Bilingual English and Spanish is a significant advantage — large Hispanic community in Anaheim. Warm, friendly, natural conversational tone — not scripted or robotic. Available during US Pacific Time hours — ideally 8am to 9pm PT. Reliable phone and fast internet connection. Previous outbound calling or customer service experience preferred. Self-motivated and comfortable with pure commission — no base pay.

Speed is the most important requirement:

A lead called within 5 minutes converts 21 times better than one called after 30 minutes. You must be able to monitor the lead sheet in real time and call immediately when a new lead appears. If you cannot commit to the 5-minute rule this role is not a good fit.

This is ongoing long-term work:

We run every Saturday year-round and are expanding to new cities every quarter. Strong performers get first access to all new leads as we grow. This is not a one-time project — it is a reliable ongoing income source for the right person.

To apply:

Please record a 60-second voice message on 
 — it is free and takes 30 seconds to set up. In the recording pretend you are calling a parent named Maria who just filled out a form about free Saturday basketball for her son. Introduce yourself as a representative of SoCal Basketball Club, tell her why you are calling, and get her excited about bringing her son this Saturday. Paste the Vocaroo link in your application. Applications without a voice sample will not be reviewed.

Salary: $500-$1,000+ USD per week based on performance

Job type: Part time / Commission only / Work from home

Location: Remote — must work US Pacific Time hours

title: Legal Intake & Operations Virtual Assistant (Social Security Disability – Remote)
description:
Company Overview:

We are a U.S.-based legal services platform focused on helping individuals resolve Social Security disability and overpayment issues. Our mission is to provide efficient, professional, and compassionate support to clients navigating the Social Security system.



We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with experience in legal intake, client communication, and workflow management—preferably with exposure to Social Security Disability (SSDI/SSI) processes.



Position Overview:

This role is critical to our daily operations. You will be responsible for managing client intake, organizing workflows, and ensuring smooth scheduling and follow-up.



You will be the first point of contact for clients, so professionalism, empathy, and attention to detail are essential.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Intake & Communication

• Answer inbound messages and calls (if required)

• Collect and enter client information accurately

• Follow intake scripts to gather required details

• Maintain professional and empathetic communication



Data Entry & Case Management

• Enter client data into CRM or tracking system

• Update case status and maintain organized records

• Track missing documents and follow up with clients



Workflow Management

• Monitor case progress from intake to consultation

• Ensure all required information is collected before next steps

• Flag urgent or high-priority cases



Scheduling

• Schedule consultations and calls

• Send confirmations and reminders

• Manage calendar updates



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience working with U.S. law firms or legal services

• Experience with Social Security Disability (SSDI/SSI) or similar processes

• Familiarity with intake forms, case tracking, or CRM systems

• Strong English communication (written and verbal)

• High attention to detail and organization

• Ability to follow structured processes and scripts



Work Schedule:

• Full-time or part-time (flexible)

• Must be available during U.S. business hours (or overlap)



To Apply, Please Answer the Following:



1. Do you have experience working with Social Security Disability (SSDI/SSI) cases or similar legal processes? Please describe.



2. Have you worked in client intake or handled inbound calls/messages before?



3. What tools or CRMs have you used?



4. How do you ensure accuracy when entering client information?



5. Why are you a good fit for this role?



Bonus (Not Required):

• Experience with SSA forms (SSA-632, SSA-561, etc.)

• Experience in U.S. legal intake or case management



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with the company. Reliable, proactive candidates with strong communication skills are encouraged to apply.

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Order & Customer Support Ops Specialist
description:
IMPORTANT NOTE - We are specifically looking for candidates based in Manila, Philippines for this role. Distilled Strategy is a 10099-based / contractor workforce. You will be required to work US hours (EST/PST) regardless of your location.



About Distilled Strategy

Distilled Strategy is a high-velocity design and strategy partner for the world’s most complex industries: Fintech, HealthTech, and B2B SaaS. We help startups and enterprises move from archaic and clunky to intuitive and fundable. Our work has helped clients raise over $170M+, and we pair strategic design with emerging tools—AI included—to modernize how businesses operate and grow.



Who We Are

We’re a gregarious crew of designers, strategists, and developers. We believe you produce your best work when given the freedom to work with a team you’d actually love to hang out with "off the clock". We take our work seriously, but not ourselves. 



Role Overview

The core mission of the Order & Customer Support Ops Specialist is to own order accuracy and operational clarity across a complex, multi-channel e-commerce operation and eliminate "silent failures" before they reach customers or leadership.



This role exists to break the “Operator’s Trap”. You are not here to simply react to tickets; you are here to stabilize order flow, surface root causes, and reduce leadership involvement by bringing structure to messy edge cases.



In this role, you will:

- Own Order Operations: Verify inventory accuracy across sales channels (Shopify, Sam’s Club, Kohl’s) and resolve WMS/OMS pipeline blocks (Extensiv to Lomac).

- Manage Customer Experience (CX): Own Zendesk as the central system, executing a "one-touch resolution" policy to solve tracking and delivery issues immediately.

- Tactical Problem Solving: Manually clear address verification errors and "fat-finger" mistakes daily before the shipping cutoff.

- Strategic Reporting: Use CX tagging to identify if issues are due to product quality, supply chain, or fulfillment errors to hold the entire system accountable.

- Reputation Management: Respond to public feedback on BazaarVoice and Okendo to proactively improve the customer journey.



You might be a good fit for us if...

- You Ask “Why,” Not Just “What”: You don’t blindly follow system outputs; you investigate until you figure out what actually happened.

- You’re a Night Owl: You are energized working US hours (Manila night shift) to ensure same-day shipping goals are met.

- You Think in Systems: You enjoy understanding how a "hub-and-spoke" system connects and looking for patterns to prevent recurring issues.

- Narrative Simplicity is Your Style: You can explain complex issues at a “9th-grade legibility” level.

- Ownership is Your Default: When something breaks, you don’t wait to be told what to do; you take initiative and close the loop.



Key Tech Stack

- CX: Zendesk (Primary), BazaarVoice, Okendo, Hotjar.

- Order Management: Extensiv (OMS), Lomax (WMS), Shopify.

- Retail Portals: Mirakl (Macy’s/Kohl’s), Sam’s Club Supplier Hub.

- AI Tools: ChatGPT/Claude for drafting brand-safe responses.



Application Instructions: We value attention to detail above all else. When applying, please set your subject line to: [Your Name] | Distilled / Order & Customer Support. This helps us filter out automated applications and get straight to the top candidates.

title: Shoe Sourcing Specialist
description:
Looking for a talented Online Arbitrage (OA) Virtual Assistant (VA) for long-term work and growth. We are specifically looking for a shoe sourcing specialist/expert. We expect you to be pre trained and have prior experience sourcing shoes. 



We are a US-based e-commerce company doing multi-millions in sales per year on Amazon. We have been consistently scaling for 5 years. We have a strong and collaborative team that values consistency and results.     

   

POSITION DETAILS:

title: Meta API Specialist – Two-Way DM to CRM Integration
description:
We are looking for a skilled Meta API Specialist to develop a two-way integration between Meta Direct Messages (DMs) and our custom-built CRM system. The goal is to automatically sync incoming and outgoing messages fro
ta platforms (such as Instagram and
 Messenger) with our internal CRM so that conversations can be managed, tracked, and responded to directly within our system.



This role requires strong experience with the Meta 
) Graph API, messaging webhooks, and building scalable integrations between external APIs and internal platforms.



Key Responsibilities

 • Develop a two-way integration between Meta Direct Messages and our custom CRM.

 • Connect and manage messaging data from Instagram and
 Messenger via the Meta Graph API.

 • Implement webhooks for real-time message synchronization between Meta platforms and the CRM.

 • Ensure bi-directional communication, allowing messages sent from the CRM to appear in Meta DMs and vice versa.

 • Maintain reliable message delivery, error handling, and logging.

 • Work with our internal team to map conversation data structures and CRM workflows.

 • Ensure compliance with Meta platform policies and API requirements.

 • Optimize performance and scalability of the integration.

 • Provide documentation and basic technical handover upon completion.



Required Skills & Experience

 • Strong experience with Meta 
) Graph API.

 • Proven experience integrating Instagra
ssaging API and/or
 Messenger API.

 • Experience implementing webhooks and event-driven architectures.

 • Backend development experience (Node.js, Python, PHP, or similar).

 • Experience integrating external APIs with custom CRM systems.

 • Understanding of authentication methods such as OAuth and access tokens.

 • Ability to debug API issues and handle rate limits, errors, and edge cases.



Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience with customer messaging automation systems.

 • Experience building chat integrations or omnichannel messaging systems.

 • Familiarity with scalable cloud environments (AWS, GCP, or similar).

 • Experience working with CRM data models and conversation pipelines.



Project Scope

 • Integrate Meta messaging APIs with an existing proprietary CRM.

 • Enable real-time synchronization of conversations.

 • Allow agents to read and reply to Meta DMs directly from the CRM.

 • Ensure conversation history and metadata are stored correctly within the CRM.



Hiring Process



To ensure we find the right technical match, the hiring process will include the following steps:

 1. Application Review – Candidates submit their experience, portfolio, or relevant API integration work.

 2. Technical Interview – A video interview to discuss previous API integrations, Meta platform experience, and architecture approach.

 3. Technical Assessment (Optional) – A short architecture discussion or technical task related to the integration.

 4. Final Interview – Review of approach, timelines, and collaboration expectations.

 5. Contract Offer – Selected candidate will receive a formal project agreement.



Only candidates who successfully complete the interview and evaluation process will be considered for the final role.



How to Apply



Please submit the following:

 • A brief introduction and relevant experience

 • Examples of API integrations you have built

 • Any experience specifically with Meta /
 / Instagra
ssaging APIs

 • Your estimated availability and hourly/project rate



We look forward to working with an experienced developer who can help us build a reliable, scalable messaging integration between Meta platforms and our CRM.

title: High-Volume Graphic Designer (Static Ads)
description:
About the Role



We are seeking a highly skilled and driven Graphic Designer to join our fast-paced, high-performing team. In this role, you will be responsible for creating high-converting static advertisements. We operate in a dynamic environment where creative diversity and high volume are essential to our success. If you thrive under pressure and have a proven track record of designing ads that drive revenue, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



Initially, you will be designing exclusively for our own company's internal campaigns. As you demonstrate your ability to produce high-quality, high-converting creatives, we will gradually migrate our client accounts to your portfolio, offering significant room for growth and increased responsibility.



Key Responsibilities



•

Design High-Converting Static Ads: Transform provided briefs and Dutch copy into visually compelling static advertisements designed to maximize conversion rates.



•

High-Volume Production: Consistently deliver a large volume of creative assets to support our need for creative diversity and rapid testing.



•

Collaborate on Strategy: Work closely with our marketing team to understand campaign goals and ensure all designs align with our brand and performance objectives.



•

Iterate and Optimize: Analyze the performance of your designs and iterate quickly to improve results.



Requirements



•

Proven Experience: A strong portfolio demonstrating your ability to create high-converting static ads.



•

Language Skills: Proficiency in Dutch is required, as you will be working with Dutch ad copy.



•

Speed and Efficiency: Ability to produce high-quality work at a high volume without compromising on detail.



•

Performance-Driven: A deep understanding of direct response marketing and what makes an ad convert.



•

Adaptability: Comfortable working in a high-performing, fast-paced environment where priorities can shift quickly.



How to Apply



To be considered for this position, you must submit two Loom videos along with your application:



1.

Introduction Video: A brief video introducing yourself, your background, and why you are the perfect fit for this high-performing environment.



2.

Portfolio & Performance Video: A detailed walkthrough of your previous work. Show us examples of static ads you have designed and, crucially, share the revenue or performance metrics those ads generated.



We are looking for top-tier talent ready to make an immediate impact. If you have the skills to drive conversions and the drive to succeed in a high-volume setting, we want to hear from you.



Note: Applications without the required Loom videos will not be considered.

title: Real Estate Outreach VA
description:
I’m hiring 3–4 sharp VAs for U.S. real estate lead research, decision-maker finding, outreach support, and lead tracking.



This is not typical mass cold calling. We work highly targeted, carefully selected leads, focusing only on the most distressed and desirable opportunities through our sniper-style research process.



This is not a passive, wait-for-instructions role. I’m looking for someone who can think clearly, take ownership, and keep moving when a lead gets difficult.



You may be a fit if you are strong at:

- research

- finding property owners / decision-makers

- clear communication

- clean note-taking

- outreach support and follow-up

- using tools like Google Sheets, CRMs, skip tracing tools, Google Maps, and county records



You must already have a VPN to access U.S.-based research sites.



I care more about honesty, resourcefulness, discipline, and problem-solving than inflated experience.



The hiring process is simple:

 Google Form ? voice note ? short Loom screen-recording test ? final 3-lead test for top applicants



If you exaggerate experience, guess instead of documenting, or need constant hand-holding, this will not be a fit.



If you are sharp, honest, coachable, and actually good, there is room to grow here.



Pay is weekly and depends on experience, skill, and performance.



There is room for increased pay and bonuses for strong results, reliability, and long-term fit.



Please apply through the form that will be sent to you. In order to receive this form clearly put the name of your favorite dog breed in the subject title of this
 to ensure you've read this entire ad. I will only respond with the form link to those who followed directions in the previous sentence.



If you want to stand out, leave a strong voice note on the form. I’ll be listening to all of them.



Share this if you know someone who would be a strong fit. I am only hiring direct. No VA sourcing companies.

title: Customer Service & Marketing Assistant (Phone + Admin Role)
description:
We’re a growing service business based in the U.S. (Premier Power Wash), and we’re looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join our team.



This role is a mix of answering phone calls, customer service, and helping with marketing/admin tasks.



This is a phone-heavy role. You will be speaking with customers regularly.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Answer Incoming Phone Calls (Most Important)



* Answer calls in clear, professional English

* Follow a provided script to guide the conversation

* Ask questions to gather customer information

* Handle basic questions (we will train you)

* Enter notes and details into our system

* Communicate clearly with our team after each call



SECONDARY RESPONSIBILITIES (WHEN PHONES ARE QUIET)



* Compile before/after photos from our CompanyCam library

* Help create simple social media content

* Research projects or local information

* Create and send quotes (we will train you)

* Follow up with customers by phone, text, or

* Assist with scheduling and general admin tasks as needed



WORK SCHEDULE (CST – U.S. CENTRAL TIME)



Saturday–Sunday: 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM

Monday–Wednesday: 7:30 AM – 11:30 AM



Plus occasional coverage when available and needed.



REQUIREMENTS



* Excellent spoken and written English

* Neutral accent and comfortable talking to American homeowners.

* Comfortable talking on the phone

* Friendly and professional communication

* Tech Stack: Reliable high-speed internet, noise-canceling headset, and a quiet workspace

* Mandatory Requirements (Do Not Apply Without These)

* Must be 100% available during the listed CST hours.

* Organized and detail-oriented



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)



* Customer service or call experience

* Social media or marketing experience

* Experience with service businesses



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



* Dependable and on time

* Clear communicator

* Follows instructions carefully

* Proactive and helpful

* Looking for a long-term role



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)



To be considered, you must follow ALL instructions:



1. Start your application with: Blue Sky

2. Send a short voice recording (20–30 seconds) introducing yourself.  You can use Vocaroo, Loom, or Google Drive. 

3. Include your internet speed (screenshot preferred)

4. Tell us your favorite movie



Applications that do not follow ALL instructions will not be considered.

title: Experienced Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer (Remote | $6- $10/hour)
description:
Experienced Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer (Remote | $6- $10/hour)



Job Description:



We are looking for a skilled and dependable Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer to join our growing team.



This is a remote role for someone with real experience in fire alarm design, and ideally also security, CCTV, and access control systems. We need someone who can produce clean, accurate work, communicate well, and take ownership of their tasks without constant follow-up.



This is not a role for someone who only knows basic drafting. We are looking for a designer who understands system layout, code compliance, submittals, and the level of detail needed for real-world projects.



If you are experienced, responsive, and take pride in doing things right, we’d love to hear from you.



Location: Remote

   Work Type: Freelance, Part-Time, or Full-Time

   Pay: $6-10/hour USD depending on experience, skill level, and overall fit



What You’ll Be Doing



> Design fire alarm, security, CCTV, and access control systems



> Create professional drawings and submittal packages using AutoCAD



> Prepare device layouts, riser diagrams, wiring details, and design documentation



> Ensure designs comply with NFPA, IBC, IFC, and local code requirements



> Revise drawings based on project updates, AHJ comments, and internal feedback



> Coordinate with project managers, contractors, and tea
mbers when needed



What We’re Looking For



> Proven experience in fire alarm system design and/or low voltage systems design



> Strong AutoCAD skills



> Good working knowledge of NFPA 72 and related fire/life safety codes



> Strong attention to detail and accuracy



> Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



> Clear communication and good follow-through



> Someone who is responsive, reliable, and professional





Nice to Have



> NICET certification in Fire Alarm Systems

> Experience preparing complete submittal packages for AHJ approval

> Familiarity with manufacturers such as Fire-Lite, DMP, Kidde, Silent Knight, Honeywell, and similar systems





Why This Role Stands Out



We are building a team for the long term. This role is a real opportunity for the right person to grow with a company that values quality, accountability, and strong systems.



*** If you perform well, there may be room for more hours, a long-term role, and future leadership opportunities.***



How to Apply



We receive a lot of applications, so we only consider candidates who follow instructions carefully.

Please complete all of the steps below:



>> Send your resume

>> Write a short paragraph explaining why you are a strong fit for this role

>> Answer this question in 2–3 sentences:

      If you are designing a fire alarm system and the AHJ requests additional devices after your initial submittal, how would you handle the change?



>> Send a 2-minute video introduction telling us:

*who you are

*your experience in fire alarm / low voltage system design

*what types of projects you’ve worked on

*why you think you would be a good fit for this role



Upload the video using Google Drive or Loom and include the link in your application



Include your availability:

      --->> Freelance, Part-Time, or Full-Time



Use this exact subject line in your application:

 Designer Application – [Your Name]



At the very end of your application, include this exact phrase:

 I want to synergize with you



Important!!

Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be prioritized.

We are looking for someone who is not only technically capable, but also attentive, professional, and serious about the opportunity.

If that sounds like you, we’d be glad to review your application.
