• Follow up with new leads and keep records organized

• Send confirmations, reminders, and messages to clients

• Assist with general administrative tasks

• Provide excellent customer service to parents and students



Schedule:

Monday – Friday

9:00 AM – 2:30 PM CST (Texas time)

Part-time (30 hours/week) — long-term, stable role



Compensation:

$4 – $6 per hour (based on experience)



Requirements:



• Excellent spoken and written English

• Clear, professional, and friendly communication skills

• Strong attention to detail and organization

• Customer service experience preferred

• Comfortable learning new software (training provided)

• Reliable high-speed internet (with backup)

• Quiet and professional work environment

• Must have own computer and headset

• Comfortable using tools such as Microsoft Office (Outlook, Excel) and communication platforms (Teams or similar)

• Experience working with CRM systems or scheduling tools is a strong plus

• Tech-savvy and able to learn new systems quickly

• Interest in using AI tools (such as ChatGPT) to improve efficiency and productivity



IMPORTANT – How to Apply:



To be considered, please follow these steps carefully:

 1. Write a short response to this situation:

“A parent calls and says they need to reschedule their child’s lesson for today. How would you respond?”

 2. Send a 1-minute video introducing yourself

(You may use Loom, Google Drive, or any video link). If you are unable to send a video, you may submit an audio recording instead.

 3. Include a screenshot of your internet speed test

 4. In your application, include the phrase:

“Music helps people grow”

(This helps us know you read the full post)

5. In one sentence, briefly explain how you have used (or would use) AI tools like ChatGPT to improve your work



About Us:



Kingwood Arts Academy of Music is a fast-growing music school focused on helping students build confidence, creativity, and a lifelong love for music. We work closely with families and pride ourselves on providing an excellent customer experience.



Why Join Us:

• Stable, long-term position

• Friendly and supportive team

• Opportunity to grow with the company

• Clear systems and training provided



We are looking to hire quickly. If you are reliable, professional, and a strong communicator, we would love to hear from you.

title: Audit Specialist
description:
Position Overview



At Paradiso Insurance, we believe it’s always about the people. As an Audit Specialist in our Parcel Delivery Department, you’ll play a critical role in protecting our clients, ensuring accuracy, and driving operational excellence. This position is perfect for someone who brings a sharp eye for detail, a passion for problem-solving, and a commitment to continuous growth.



You won’t just be auditing files, you’ll be supporting our team, strengthening client relationships, and helping us deliver on our promise of exceptional service with a servant’s heart and a winner’s spirit.



Key Responsibilities:

Review rating, classifications, exposures, and billing accuracy to ensure compliance

Collaborate with internal teams (sales, service, and operations) to resolve audit findings

Excellent communication and collaboration skills

What Sets You Apart

Why Join Paradiso Insurance?

title: Organic and Paid Video Editor
description:
Video Editor — UGC & Social Content (Remote, Philippines-Based)

We're a Female Condom company looking for a talented video editor based in the Philippines to join our team on a freelance basis. If you have a great creative eye, love social media content, and know how to make videos feel alive — keep reading.



What you'll be doing

You'll be taking raw UGC footage and transforming it into scroll-stopping social content for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. This means adding motion graphics, fun animations, captions, and sound design that elevate the video without losing that authentic, real-person feel. You'll work primarily on short-form content (Reels, TikToks) and will play a big role in shaping how our brand shows up visually on social.



What we're looking for

You have a genuine feel for what makes content perform on social — you watch Reels and TikToks and instinctively know why something works. You can take a raw, unpolished clip and make it gripping without making it feel produced or salesy (think about the videos that content creators in New York City are making). You understand the difference between content that feels like an ad and content that actually stops people from scrolling — and you always aim for the latter. You're comfortable with motion graphics and animation and know how to use them to add energy and personality rather than noise. You're proactive, communicative, and take creative ownership of your work.



Must-haves

You're proficient in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or CapCut (or a combination). You have experience editing short-form social content specifically — a portfolio that shows this is essential. You have a strong sense of pacing, music, and sound design. You're reliable, meet deadlines, and communicate clearly in English. Experience with After Effects or motion graphics tools.



Strong grasp of visual hierarchy — knowing how to use scale, contrast, and placement to guide the viewer's eye and emphasize the right 
nts. Uses design intentionally to reinforce key messages, not just decorate the frame

Understands how to create captions and text overlays that add context or emotion rather than just transcribing what's being said. Keeps a pulse on design trends to ensure content feels current and platform-native, not dated. Knows how to balance brand consistency with visual freshness — so everything looks cohesive without feeling repetitive. Can make deliberate choices around font, color, and motion that elevate the content and reflect a premium, modern aesthetic



Nice to haves

A background in or passion for health, wellness, or lifestyle content. Experience working with UGC creators or social-first brands.



How to apply

Please send an edited version of this video as an example of your capabilities: 

Please provide a rundown of all the edits you made and why you made them. I am looking for someone with strong strategic skills. 

See examples of videos here:

title: Growth & Outreach Specialist (Email, LinkedIn & Content)
description:
Role Overview:



We are looking for a technical and creative Virtual Assistant to manage our in-house outreach engine and social media presence for The Print Company. You will be responsible for managing a 30-domain cold
 system, running LinkedIn automation, and creating high-quality static brand assets for our e-commerce launch and corporate services.



Key Responsibilities:



1.
 Infrastructure (30 Domains):

- Connect 30 domains (Porkbun) to Mailpool/Mailforge and ensure 100% valid SPF, DKIM, and DMARC.

- Manage 60-90 inboxes in Instantly.ai, maintaining automated warm-ups and daily sending limits (25-30/day).

- Monitor Google Postmaster Tools daily to ensure high domain reputation.

 

2. Omnichannel Outreach (LinkedIn +
):

- Manage LinkedIn automation via HeyReach, ensuring account safety using Dedicated Residential Proxies.

- Build sequences that pivot from LinkedIn to
 if requests are ignored.

- Scrape and clean lead lists from 
 and Sales Navigator, verifying all data via NeverBounce.



3. Content & Graphic Creation:

- Design high-quality static images in Canva for Instagram (e-commerce/lifestyle) and LinkedIn (B2B/Corporate).

- Use AI tools (like Pebblely/Photoroom) to create professional product staging for our print products.

- Maintain a consistent brand aesthetic (fonts/colors) across all platforms.



4. Operations & Reporting:

- Manage the Master Inbox in Instantly/HeyReach to triage leads.

- Push "Interested" leads to our CRM and provide weekly reports on campaign health.



Technical Requirements:



- Tools: Instantly.ai, HeyReach, Apollo, Canva, Porkbun/DNS Management.

- Skills: Deep understanding of
 deliverability, LinkedIn safety limits, and basic graphic design.

- Experience: Must have managed at least 15+ domains simultaneously in the past.



How to Apply:



1. Please start your application with the word "PRINT."

2. Briefly describe your experience setting up multi-domain
 infrastructure.

3. Send a link to a portfolio or 2-3 samples of social media graphics you’ve created in Canva.

4. Confirm you understand the difference between a VPN and a Residential Proxy for LinkedIn safety.

title: Client Account Managers
description:
Overview



We are seeking dedicated and detail-oriented Client Account Managers to join our team. In this role, you will serve as the primary point of contact for our clients, ensuring clear communication, strong relationships, and a smooth experience as we manage and scale their Amazon stores.



This is a fast-paced role within the Amazon automation / e-commerce space, ideal for someone who is organized, responsive, and comfortable working with clients daily.



Responsibilities

Manage day-to-day communication with assigned clients

Respond to client inquiries via Slack in a timely and professional manner

Provide updates on store performance, progress, and next steps

Maintain strong client relationships and ensure client satisfaction

Escalate issues internally and coordinate with operations teams

Occasionally communicate with clients via phone when needed

Keep organized records of client conversations and updates

Requirements

Fluent in English (written and spoken)

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

Ability to manage multiple client conversations at once

Comfortable using tools like Slack (or similar communication platforms)

Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely

Problem-solving mindset and attention to detail

Prior experience in customer service, account management, or e-commerce is a plus







Send a recording of you saying this script 



"Hi [Client Name], this is [Your Name] with the account management team.



I just wanted to reach out and introduce myself as your main point of contact moving forward. My role is to make sure you’re always updated on your store’s progress and that any questions or concerns you have are handled quickly.



We’re actively working on managing and scaling your Amazon store, and I’ll be keeping you informed every step of the way. If you ever need anything, feel free to message me directly on Slack, and I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.



Also, if needed, I’m always available to hop on a quick call to go over anything in more detail.



Looking forward to working with you and helping grow your store.”

title: Video Editor needed for regular, ongoing work
description:
THE COMPANY

Avalon Creative Group is a dynamic and innovative company headquartered in the heart of the San Francisco Bay Area and Silicon Valley in California. We specialize in the creation of captivating and immersive content for corporate clients, offering comprehensive content design, production, and creative services. Working with Avalon Creative Group presents an exciting opportunity for individuals seeking to collaborate with renowned brands, while also offering a continuous learning environment that fosters personal and professional growth.



JOB DESCRIPTION

Avalon Creative Group is seeking a talented and experienced video editor and 3D animator based in the Philippines to work with us as an independent contractor. Our work includes videos to inspire audiences at corporate events, on-demand marketing webinars, internal corporate training and sales enablement, product demos, highlight reels, social media ads, interviews, customer testimonials and more.



Our goal is to establish a long term working relationship with a creative, reliable and ambitious video professional. After successfully completing an initial trial period, the right person will become an integral member of our creative team on a full-time contract basis.



RESPONSIBILITIES

> Edit high quality videos from a variety of sources, including single-camera, multi-camera, stock footage, AI generated video, graphic elements, music, sound effects, etc.

> Effectively and efficiently generate video footage and elements using the latest AI tools

> Manage accuracy and correction of color and audio

> Understand and apply corporate branding and style guidelines and templates (MOGRTs)

> Manage, organize and backup video assets and deliverables, including raw footage, graphics, sound files, stock footage, projects, files, etc.

> Adhere to budgeted time constraints while incorporating client feedback and changes through multiple rounds of review and revisions

> Contribute to and consistently apply efficient workflow processes and standards (SOPs)

> Document guidelines and process details for tea
mbers and clients

> Pursue ongoing professional development and skill enhancements



REQUIRED SKILLS

> Having a proven track record of punctuality, reliability and professionalism is essential

> Excellent attention to detail and adeptness at managing multiple concurrent projects is required

> Strong communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a remote team environment

> English fluency (written and spoken) along with excellent communication skills are essential

> You must be based in the Philippines with fast, reliable internet access and a robust computer

> You must have a quiet workspace where you can work without distractions and join Zoom calls



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

> At least 2 years of professional experience and proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite, specifically Premiere Pro and After Effects

> Bonus if you have experience or proficiency with using 3D software like Blender, Cinema4D, or anything similar.

> You must have strong creative skills and a portfolio of work that demonstrates your passion and experience with video editing and motion graphics

>> Your portfolio must include examples of the type of work listed in the job description section

> Expertise in video editing fundamentals and techniques, including pacing, storytelling, and continuity

> Knowledge of different video formats and codecs for various delivery platforms



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

> 5 years of experience with Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects.

> At least 2 years of experience and proficiency with Blender or Cinema 4D.

> Proficiency in color correction, audio editing, and mastering

> Familiarity with team communication and project management tools like Smartsheet, Slack, ClickUp, or similar platforms

> Familiarity or experience using AI post-production tools

> Strong understanding of visual composition, typography, and graphic design principles

> Completion of training and/or certifications in key software used

> Knowledge of social media platforms and video encoding specifications for each platform



COMPENSATION & ENGAGEMENT

> Compensation rate for full-time, independent contractor will be $1000 - $1300 USD per month

> Ten paid holidays and ten days of accrued paid time off (PTO) will be included annually

> Rate will be based on qualifications and experience

> This is a remote work position

> Work hours will need to overlap with standard business hours in California (9:00-6:00pm PT)



HOW TO APPLY

If you are interested in working with us as an independent contractor and you meet the required qualifications listed above, please APPLY HERE - 
/
/f/8cfra9g-19833/RD6JGYJONEOXD2WUN0

title: Legal Recruiting Operations Assistant
description:
About the role:



We are a legal recruiting company looking for a full-time Research & CRM Assistant to support our outreach and database operations.



This person will be responsible for researching attorneys and law firms online, gathering accurate contact and background information, entering and updating data in our CRM, enriching records using tools like ZoomInfo and LinkedIn, and assisting with outreach tasks such as adding contacts to
 sequences and sending LinkedIn messages.



This is a detail-heavy role that requires strong research skills, excellent written English, and a high level of accuracy. The ideal candidate is organized, process-driven, tech-savvy, and comfortable handling repetitive work with consistency and care.



Key responsibilities:

- Research attorneys and law firms through firm websites, LinkedIn, ZoomInfo, and other online sources

- Identify and collect accurate contact details including names, titles, phone numbers,
 addresses, office locations, and practice areas

- Enter new contacts into the CRM with a high level of accuracy

- Update and maintain existing CRM records to ensure data is clean, complete, and organized

- Use enrichment tools such as ZoomInfo and LinkedIn to verify and supplement contact data

- Tag, segment, and organize contacts properly inside the CRM

- Add contacts to the appropriate outreach sequences and campaigns

- Send LinkedIn messages and assist with outreach based on templates and internal processes

- Track completed work and maintain organized records of daily activity

- Follow written SOPs and internal workflows consistently

- Flag missing data, duplicate records, or unclear information for review

- Support ongoing list building and database management projects



Requirements:



- Bachelor’s degree required

- 1+ years of experience in research, CRM management, lead generation, recruiting support, sales support, operations, or administrative support

- Strong experience with online research and data entry

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Strong written English

- Comfortable using LinkedIn, Google, firm websites, and contact databases

- Experience working inside a CRM

- Able to follow instructions and repeat processes consistently

- Strong organizational and time management skills

- Reliable internet connection and ability to work full-time remotely



Preferred qualifications:

- Experience using ZoomInfo or similar enrichment tools

- Experience with outreach platforms or
 sequencing tools

- Experience supporting recruiting, staffing, sales, or business development teams

- Experience researching professional services firms, attorneys, or executive-level contacts

- Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach and contact list building

- Experience with legal recruiting or law firm research is a plus



What success looks like in this role:



- CRM records are accurate, complete, and consistently formatted

- Attorney contact data is researched and enriched efficiently

- Contacts are added to the correct sequences without errors

- Outreach support tasks are completed on time

- Database quality improves over time rather than getting messier

- Minimal supervision is needed once training is complete



Please do not apply unless you are highly detail-oriented and comfortable doing research and CRM work for most of the day.

title: YouTube Video Editor
description:
Hey!



I’m looking for a skilled and reliable video editor to create YouTube videos in the fitness niche (strength, mobility, longevity).

Script

Voiceover

Clips / B-roll

Images

Background music

Clean editing and pacing

$30–35 USD per English video (12–15 min)

+$10 USD per additional language



Each project usually includes:

English version

3 translated versions

Total per project: $60–65 USD



???? About Translations:

Translations are fairly easy work:

Script + voiceover are fully provided

Same video structure as English version

You mainly adjust timing and text to match the new voiceover



Style:

Clean and professional

Focus on retention

Around 1 video per week

title: Digital Ads Manager
description:
Job Title: Digital Ads Specialist (Wellness Industry – Conversion Focused)



Location: Remote

Type: Part-Time (with opportunity to grow into a long-term role)



About Us:

We are a premium, science-based wellness and movement company focused on helping clients achieve pain-free, high-performing bodies through an integrative approach rooted in fascia science, manual therapy principles, and movement education.



Our services are highly personalized and results-driven. This is not a typical fitness or stretch business—our messaging requires depth, clarity, and the ability to communicate complex concepts in a way that converts.



Role Overview:

We are seeking a high-level Digital Ads Specialist who is focused on driving bookings—not just leads.



This role requires someone who can think beyond basic ad management and take ownership of the full customer journey—from ad click to booked appointment. You must understand how to align messaging, targeting, and offers to attract the right clients and convert them effectively.



Key Responsibilities:



Strategize, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns (Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and other relevant platforms)

Optimize campaigns for bookings and conversions, not vanity metrics

Develop and test high-converting ad copy aligned with our brand voice

Translate complex wellness and movement concepts into clear, compelling messaging

Identify and target ideal client demographics (35–65, wellness-focused, results-driven)

Monitor and improve key performance metrics:

-Cost per booking

-Conversion rates

-Return on ad spend

-Implement retargeting strategies to increase conversion rates

-Collaborate on offers, promotions, and campaign strategy

-Provide weekly performance reports with insights and recommendations



Core Requirements:

Advanced/professional-level English (written and verbal)

Proven experience managing and optimizing paid ad campaigns with measurable results

Strong understanding of conversion strategy (not just lead generation)

Experience in the wellness, fitness, health, or bodywork industry is a must

Ability to quickly understand and communicate nuanced, high-value services

Strong copywriting skills aligned with a premium, educational brand voice

An analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and make strategic decisions

Highly proactive, self-directed, and results-oriented



What We’re Specifically Looking For:



Someone who focuses on quality leads that convert into paying clients

Someone who understands that messaging is just as important as targeting

Someone who can bridge the gap between science-based services and marketing

Someone who takes ownership of performance and continuously improves results



Compensation:



Competitive hourly rate: $10–$15/hour (based on experience)

Opportunity to transition into a monthly retainer + performance-based incentives

Long-term growth potential into a senior marketing role



How to Apply

Note: Applications that avoid these steps will not be considered.



Please submit

-A brief introduction highlighting your experience with digital ads and the wellness industry

-Examples of campaigns you have managed (include results—especially conversions/bookings if available) 

-A short explanation of how you approach improving conversion rates (not just generating leads)

-Any relevant portfolio, case studies, or accounts you’ve worked on

-Your availability and hourly rate



We are looking for someone who is ready to operate at a high level, take ownership of results, and help us grow quickly by bringing in the right clients—not just more traffic.



If you understand how to turn attention into action and clicks into committed clients, we want to hear from you.

title: Podio and Globiflow Systems Specialist - Real Estate
description:
Ultra Homebuyers is a real estate wholesaling and acquisitions company. We run our entire lead pipeline through Podio with GlobiFlow automations handling routing, follow-ups, and team notifications.



We're hiring one full-time specialist to own, build, and maintain this infrastructure.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Build Podio apps, workspaces, and relationships from scratch

- Create, troubleshoot, and optimize GlobiFlow automations

- Connect Podio to third-party tools via Zapier and webhooks

- Maintain data integrity across our lead pipeline

- Document all systems clearly

- Assist with reporting views, calculated fields, and dashboards



REQUIREMENTS:

- Expert-level Podio (apps, relationships, calculated fields, permissions)

- Expert-level GlobiFlow (conditional logic, multi-step flows, webhooks)

- Working knowledge of Zapier and webhook integrations

- Strong written English and documentation habits

- Detail-oriented and systematic — our pipeline runs at scale



A STRONG PLUS: Real estate, wholesale, or lead management experience



HOW TO APPLY:

Respond with the following:

1. Describe the most complex GlobiFlow automation you've personally built. Walk me through what it did, how you triggered it, what conditions it checked, and what actions it took. Be specific — I want to see how you think, not just what you did.

2. What tools have you connected to Podio outside of GlobiFlow? (Zapier, webhooks, APIs, etc.) Describe one integration you set up and how it worked.

3. Have you worked in a real estate, wholesaling, or lead generation environment before? If yes, describe the Podio setup — what apps were in the workspace, how leads moved through the pipeline, and what your role was in building or maintaining it.



This is a full-time role. 30 hours/week. Daily availability required.

title: Afterhours Engineer - NOC/SOC/Support
description:
Please apply for this job here: 



JOB SUMMARY

The Afterhours Engineer - NOC\SOC\Support is important in the Service Delivery division at CTS. Operating as the primary guardian of our clients' infrastructure during off-peak hours, this role combines Network Operations (NOC), Security Operations (SOC), and high-level VIP support.



Responsible for delivering impeccable maintenance, security monitoring, and "white-glove" support, this engineer must exhibit a sense of ownership over various systems. You will be responsible for triaging security alerts, executing i
 response playbooks, and ensuring VIP requests are resolved immediately, ensuring our clients’ environments are stable and secure before the morning shift arrives.



This is an individual contributor - technical position.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Service Delivery: Respond to and resolve service i
 following existing procedures and Service Level Agreements (SLAs). Track time, communications, and work output via ConnectWise Manage PSA.

Network Operations (NOC) Monitoring & Remediation: Remediate alerts from monitoring tools generated from firewalls, switches, access points, physical and virtual workstations, servers, and storage devices. Configure monitoring of client infrastructure using PRTG, Kaseya VSA, and ConnectWise Manage.

Security & I
 Response (SOC): Act as the first line of defense for security alerts. Triage potential threats (e.g., suspicious logins, EDR alerts, phishing reports) using established I
 Response playbooks. Isolate infected endpoints to prevent lateral movement and document forensic details.

VIP & Helpdesk Support: Provide primary "white-glove" remote support for VIP clients (CEOs/Executives) experiencing after-hours technical issues. Address all phone calls and urgent tickets outside of regular business hours with a focus on rapid resolution.

Cloud Administration: Administer and troubleshoot Microsoft 365 (Exchange, Teams, SharePoint) and Google Workspace environments to resolve urgent user access or configuration issues.

Maintenance & Automation: Administer and perform the work for monthly, quarterly, bi-annual, and yearly maintenance plans. Assist higher-level Engineers to automate recurring requests using Ninja RMM, ConnectWise Manage, PRTG, and PowerShell.

Backup Management: Monitor and remediate all CTS-provided client backup solutions: Acronis On-Prem, Acronis Cloud, and AFI.

Documentation: Create and maintain information and documentation in ConnectWise Manage and ITGlue to ensure a smooth handoff to the daytime engineering team.



REQUIRED SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

2+ years of experience in an MSP (Managed Service Provider) environment, specifically in a NOC or an L2/L3 escalation role.

Cybersecurity Fundamentals: Strong understanding of cybersecurity principles, threat landscapes (ransomware, phishing), and experience executing I
 Response playbooks.

Cloud Platforms: Advanced administration skills in Microsoft 365 (User management, Intune, MFA troubleshooting) and Google Workspace.

Networking: Experience with networking protocols: TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VPN, IPSEC, VoIP, and QoS. Experience in WAN/LAN networking, including routing, switching, security, and load balancing.

OS Support: Experience with Microsoft Windows Server, Windows Desktop, and Apple Ecosystem.

WLAN & Hardware: Experience in WLAN technologies (Meraki, UniFi, Cisco) and Network Attached Storage (NAS).

VoIP: Experience with Grand Stream or other Asterisk-based PBX systems.

Soft Skills: Exceptional written and oral communication skills with the ability to de-escalate stressful situations for VIP clients.

Work Ethic: Self-motivated, with excellent time management skills and the ability to work independently without supervision during overnight hours.



PREFERRED SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

MSP experience.

Knowledge of scripting/programming language, including, but not limited to, PowerShell, BASH, and/or VBScript

Knowledge of network vendors: SonicWALL, Juniper MIST, Meraki, and Unifi

Knowledge of security tools: EDR/XDR,
 Filtering, Security Awareness, and Cloud Backups

Experience with MSP-related tools: ConnectWise Manage, Ninja RMM, PRTG, and ITGlue



WORK LOCATION & SCHEDULE

This is a full-time remote position for candidates located in the Philippines

The hours for this position are 6pm-6am EST, 4x/week including weekends (on a rotation basis)

COMPENSATION



The salary range for this role is $1600 - $2500/monthly



BENEFITS

Paid Time Off

Floating Holidays



This is an independent contractor role.

title: Client Concierge Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Concierge Coordinator serves as a pivotal support role for clients attending our Essentials Workshops and other Cardone Ventures events. This individual is responsible for ensuring that every client has a seamless and remarkable experience from the 
nt of purchase through event attendance. The role includes managing communications, conducting welcome calls, coordinating event scheduling, and providing customer service support via
, phone, and other communication channels. This person will proactively handle client needs, such as confirming event attendance, addressing concerns, and upselling additional seats or tickets.



This will be a contract position only of 3-6 months



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Driving an increase in client engagement and event participation by effectively managing communications and follow-ups to ensure high attendance rates, upselling additional seats or tickets, and maximizing event participation



OBJECTIVES

• Manage post-sale client interactions to confirm ticket payments and ensure attendance at purchased events.

• Audit pre-event task completion and manage reminders to ensure clients are ready for their events.

• Assist the Client Concierge Manager in resolving client concerns, answering queries, and enhancing client satisfaction.

• Facilitate event scheduling, including follow-ups with clients who have not scheduled their attendance and rescheduling as necessary.

• Upsell additional event tickets or seats by effectively using sales scripts tailored to various Cardone Ventures events and workshops.

• Build trust and maintain positive client relationships through open and interactive communication.

• Manage various client communications platforms, including HubSpot, Asana, G-Suite, Slick Text, and Aloware, ensuring timely responses and accurate information sharing.

• Monitor and manage und
 calls and tasks, marketing responses, and communication blasts to drive client engagement.

• Support with scrubbing and managing deals related to 10X360 and Essential Workshops to ensure accurate tracking and client follow-up

• Ensure response times to client inquiries are within a 24-hour window, maintaining a high standard of customer service.



COMPETENCIES

• Proven experience in de-escalating client situations while maintaining a positive representation of the Cardone Ventures brand.

• Proficiency in HubSpot, Asana, and G-Suite tools (Sheets, Documents, Gmail, Calendars, Slides).

• Strong communication skills with the ability to memorize and effectively utilize essential sales scripts.

• High level of business acumen to engage with business owners and understand their needs.

• Capable of executing process improvements to streamline client communications and event coordination.

• Ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks, including daily priority meetings, pre-event qualifications, and managing client communications across multiple platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• At least 2 years’ experience in a customer service role in a professional environment



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, 10X Health System recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:

title: Video Editor and Media Manager
description:

I direct a nonprofit organization, and we need a video editor and media manager to produce training content and storytelling media. We are looking for a clear communicator with strong video editing skills and an eye for detail and design.

 to see if you are passionate about our mission.

Audio tracks

title: Remote US Payroll Specialist & Bookkeeper
description:
About Priceless CPA

Priceless CPA is distinguished by our core values of trustworthiness, compassion, and diligence. With a deep commitment to making a positive impact on our clients’ lives and finances, we seek to build meaningful relationships that go beyond the numbers. We find satisfaction and fulfillment in providing exceptional service that truly benefits our clients. As a team, we support each other to become better professionals and people.

We are currently seeking a Remote US Payroll Specialist & Bookkeeper who is fluent in English, knowledgeable in IFRS, and has strong experience in preparing taxes. Handling U.S. Payroll and Bookkeeping are highly preferred. If you have the skills and passion to work in a dynamic, growth-oriented environment, we would love to hear from you.



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable US Payroll Specialist & Bookkeeper to manage both client bookkeeping and U.S. payroll operations. This is a dual-focus role where both bookkeeping and payroll are equally important. We’re looking for someone dependable, detail-oriented, and comfortable handling both bookkeeping and U.S. payroll responsibilities.



Key Responsibilities



US Payroll & Compliance

Manage U.S. payroll processing and filings for multiple clients

Handle state payroll registrations across various U.S. states

Ensure compliance with federal and state payroll requirements

Resolve payroll-related issues, including:

Communicating with U.S. state agencies

Handling notices, discrepancies, and filings

Work with payroll platforms (e.g., Gusto, ADP, or similar)

Bookkeeping

Maintain accurate books for clients using QuickBooks Online (QBO)

Handle monthly and quarterly bookkeeping for ongoing clients

Prepare and clean up books for annual clients to ensure tax readiness

Perform account reconciliations and ensure financial accuracy

Administrative Support

Assist with client bookkeeping and payroll requests

Support internal coordination and basic administrative tasks as needed



Qualifications

Proven experience handling U.S. payroll, including multi-state filings (Minimum 2 years)

Experience communicating with U.S. government/state agencies

Strong experience with QuickBooks Online (Minimum 2 years)

Solid understanding of U.S. bookkeeping and accounting principles

High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Nice to Have

Experience working with a CPA or accounting firm

Familiarity with multiple payroll platforms (Gusto, ADP, etc.)

Experience with U.S. tax preparation, as there are growing opportunities to support in this area



What We Offer

Fully remote, flexible work environment

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling CPA firm

Long-term growth and increased responsibility opportunities



Additional Details

Job Type: Full-Time

Schedule: Flexible with required overlap during U.S. business hours 

Remote Location

title: Appointment Setter
description:
About QVM Digital Marketing

QVM Digital Marketing Inc. is a remote-first digital marketing agency based in Winnipeg, Manitoba. We help businesses and non-profits across Canada grow their online presence through SEO, Website Design and Development, Social Media, Content Creation, and Business Sales Strategies. We're a tight-knit, fast-moving team that takes our work seriously and has a lot of fun doing it.



The Role

We're looking for a sharp, people-friendly Appointment Setter to join our team. You'll be the first point of contact for a lot of potential clients, which means you set the tone. Your job is to book qualified discovery calls, follow up consistently, and support our ad campaigns with organized outreach and tracking. If you're great on the phone, love staying organized, and get a kick out of turning a cold lead into a booked meeting, this is the role for you.



What You'll Do

Reach out to leads via phone and
 to book discovery calls with our sales team

Follow up on inbound inquiries from our website, ads, and social media channels

Manage and update lead records in our CRM to keep the pipeline clean and current

Support our paid ad campaigns by following up on leads generated through Meta Ads and Google Ads

Send personalized follow-up
s and coordinate scheduling with prospects

Track outreach activity and report on call volume, bookings, and conversion rates

Collaborate with the team to refine messaging and improve booking rates over time



What You Bring

Prior experience in appointment setting, sales, or outbound calling (marketing industry is a plus)

Confident, clear communicator, both on the phone and in writing

Highly organized with strong follow-through and attention to detail

Comfortable working independently in a remote setting

Experience using a CRM (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, or similar)

Basic understanding of digital marketing services is an asset

Positive attitude and a genuine interest in helping businesses grow



Nice to Have

Familiarity with Meta Ads or Google Ads lead generation workflows

Experience with
 sequencing or outreach automation tools

Background in a Canadian B2B or professional services environment

title: Fullstack Dev – Ad Platform Build
description:
We're building a web-based ad management platform inspired by Rapid Ads and 
. 



This is a fixed-price project ($700 total) with a 2-3 week delivery deadline and two milestone-based payments. We'll provide a paid subscription to one of the reference apps so you can study the functionality firsthand. AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, etc.) are provided and encouraged, but you need real technical skill to use them effectively.

Core functionality:



- Connect via
 account to upload, edit, and manage ads before publishing

- 
 API integration, pull approved assets directly into the platform so our team can go from creative approval to ad   upload without re-downloading and re-uploading files (kitchn already does this)

- Clean, usable web interface for managing the full workflow



What you'll do:

- Phase 1 – Feature and UI build of the core platform:
 account connection, ad creation/editing flow, and 
 asset sync. ($350 issued upon Phase 1 milestone completion.)



- Phase 2 – Enhancements, customization, and polish to make it our own. ($350 issued upon final delivery.)



Deadline: 2-3 weeks from project start. 



Tech and deployment: You will not be deploying this on your accounts, but help us handle our own infrastructure. You deliver clean, documented source code and a list of what we need to provision (hosting, database, services, etc.). We're familiar with Supabase so that's a natural fit for the backend, but we're open if you have a strong reason to go another direction.



What we need from you: Independent problem solver who doesn't need hand-holding. Prior experience building web applications that integrate with third-party APIs — especially Meta/Facebook and/or 
. Demonstrated ability to use AI coding tools for real development work. Strong enough coding knowledge to debug, refactor, and push through when AI output isn't perfect.



All source code and IP belongs to us upon payment. Strong performers will be considered for ongoing development work.



To apply, include:



 - A link to a web app you've built or helped develop

 - A brief description of something you built with AI tools, and your approach when you hit a technical wall



Don't apply if:



 - You need step-by-step instructions for every task

 - You've never shipped a web app or worked on one

 - You think AI tools mean you don't need to understand code

 - You have no experience working with third-party APIs

title: Backlink Outreach Specialist — SEO Agency (Link Building / Outreach & Coordination)
description:
TO APPLY: Send an
 to 
 with the subject line -> LOCAL BACKLINKING SPECIALIST (details for application at end of job post) 



ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re Blue Crocus Solutions, a Canadian SEO and web development agency working exclusively with local home service businesses in the United States and Canada — junk removal, HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, and similar trades.

We’re hiring a Backlink Outreach Specialist to manage our local link building program for real clients, on real websites, with real business owners.



Before you read further — if your experience with “guest post outreach” means searching for “write for us” pages and submitting to generic blogs, that is not this job. This role has nothing to do with that.



Our link building program is built entirely on genuine local relationships. Every website we target is owned by a real business owner in our client’s community — someone our client may already know, refer to, or work alongside. You are not prospecting the internet for willing hosts. You are working directly with our clients and their real-world networks to earn placements that actually mean something for their local SEO.



That means this role is deeply hands-on. You will be talking to our clients. You will be talking to their business contacts. You will be coordinating website access, troubleshooting problems, and staying on top of every moving piece until the link is live and confirmed indexed. There is no part of this process where you sit back and wait for things to happen on their own.



This is not a content writing role. This is not a data entry role. This is not a behind-the-scenes role. This is front-line outreach and coordination — in the weeds, with real people, across every client we serve.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

You own the entire process from identification to indexed link, across up to 25 client markets simultaneously. 



That means:

 1. Client Coordination

You’ll work directly with clients to get a list of local businesses they already have relationships with — their referral network, trade contacts, and business friends. This requires clear, professional communication and the ability to get information out of busy business owners without making it feel like homework for them.

 2. Opportunity Research

For each business on the list, you research their website. Does it have a blog? What’s the domain authority? What does their audience actually care about? You make the call on whether the opportunity is worth pursuing — and you need to be able to back that judgment up.

 3. Outreach & Pitching

You reach out to those business owners and pitch a guest post — a free, helpful article that genuinely serves their audience and naturally includes a link back to our client. The pitch has to be worth saying yes to. That means you need to think creatively about what their audience would actually find useful, not just come up with a reason our client gets a link.

We provide templates as a starting point. You adapt them. You personalize them. You make them human.

 4. Follow-Up — By
 and Phone

You follow up until you get a real response. That means multiple
s, phone calls, and different angles if the first one doesn’t land. You do not send one
 and move on.

 5. Coordination & Access

Once a placement is confirmed, you coordinate getting website access so our content team can publish the article. This involves communicating clearly with the business owner, troubleshooting access issues, and keeping things moving without being annoying about it.

 6. Getting the Page Up & Indexed

You follow through until the article is live and confirmed indexed by Google. You’re not done when the placement is agreed to — you’re done when the link exists and works.

 7. Additional Outreach Programs

Once you've learned the local link building process, you’ll also support additional outreach programs we run for clients. These are more structured and easier to manage — if you can handle local link building, you’ll be able to handle these with minimal ramp-up time.



THIS ROLE IS A GREAT FIT IF YOU:

? Have done outreach before — link building, cold
, sales, PR, or similar

? Understand what a backlink is and why it matters for SEO (you don’t need to be an expert, but you need to genuinely understand the concept)

? Can think creatively — you look at a partner’s website and ask “what would actually be useful for their audience?” before you pitch anything

? Are a natural coordinator — comfortable talking to clients, business owners, and internal teams to keep a multi-step process moving

? Are the kind of person who follows up until they get an answer — you don’t send one
 and move on

? Can manage a lot of moving pieces across 20+ clients without dropping anything

? Write professional, natural-sounding English — no robotic templates

? Are comfortable making phone calls in English to US-based business owners

? Have a reliable internet connection and a quiet space for calls



THIS ROLE IS NOT A FIT IF YOU:

? Have never done outreach or cold
 before

? Think “link building” means finding “write for us” pages on random blogs

? Are uncomfortable making phone calls or talking directly with business owners

? Need to be reminded to follow up

? Are looking for a passive, behind-the-scenes role

? Need to be told exactly what to say in every situation — this role requires judgment, creativity, and the ability to adapt in real conversations

? Consider something done when it’s “sent” — this role is about outcomes, not activity



REQUIREMENTS

 ? Fluent English (written and spoken) — professional and conversational

 ? Prior outreach experience (link building, cold
, VA research, sales, digital PR, or similar)

 ? Solid understanding of SEO backlinks — what makes a link valuable, how to evaluate an opportunity

 ? Strong coordination and communication skills — you’ll be talking to clients and business owners regularly

 ? Highly organized — you’ll be managing multi-step processes across many clients simultaneously

 ? Availability during overlap hours with US Eastern time (we’ll discuss schedule)

 ? Quiet environment and reliable internet for calls



BONUS POINTS FOR:

 ? Experience working with a digital marketing or SEO agency

 ? Familiarity with domain authority tools (Ahrefs, Moz, SEMrush)

 ? Experience managing outreach campaigns or link building programs end-to-end



WHAT WE OFFER

 ? Long-term, stable role with a growing agency

 ? Clear systems and SOPs — you’ll know exactly what good looks like

 ? Supportive team with regular check-ins

 ? Opportunity to grow as we scale this service



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please follow the instructions below, EXACTLY

Applications missing any answer will not be reviewed.



Start your application with the sentence:

“Local links > lazy links.”



1. Tell me about the most difficult outreach you’ve ever done.

Who were you contacting?

What made it difficult?

What did you actually do to get a response? 



2. You send 3
s and get no response.

What do you do next? Be specific: Exact steps, Timeline, Channels



3. You are managing 20 clients and 60+ outreach conversations at once.

How do you make sure nothing gets dropped?



4. This role requires:

Following up multiple times

Calling business owners

Handling ignored messages



Tell me about a time you had to persist when someone wasn’t responding. What happened?



5. If you were an animal, what animal would you be and why?



6. What does this quote mean to you personally? “Work is love made visible.” — Khalil Gibran



7. Find a random fact about our founder, Lewis Vandervalk, and cite your source. 



Blue Crocus Solutions is a remote-first agency. We value reliable, self-directed people who take ownership of their work and see things through to completion. If that’s you — we’d love to hear from you.????????????????

title: Social Media and Influencer Partnerships Specialist - Zunex Pest Control
description:
About Zunex

Zunex Pest Control is a fast-growing family-owned pest control company protecting homes across Utah and Washington. We have over 3,000 verified five-star Google reviews and a reputation built on honest, effective, family-safe service. We treat every home like our own and we treat every tea
mber the same way.

We are building our marketing function from the ground up and we are looking for the right person to own a significant piece of it long term.

What We Are Building

Influencer-driven content through Instagram Stories has produced exceptional results for pest control companies in other US markets. We have studied what works, we know the format, and we will provide you with benchmark accounts from companies that have done this well so you are not starting blind.

In our Utah and Washington markets this strategy has not been executed at full effort. That means the opportunity is real, the timing is right, and the person who builds this program will be doing something first in markets that are ready for it.

This is a builder role not a maintenance role. We want someone who is genuinely excited about creating something from scratch and seeing it grow.

What You Will Own

Influencer Partnership Program

Find and vet lifestyle influencers, mommy bloggers, and family content creators in our Utah and Washington service areas. Send personalized outreach, build genuine relationships, and onboard partners into our program. Each partner receives a free pest control service and shares their experience through four Instagram Stories during their visit. They get a unique tracking link and earn $50 to $100 for every booking their audience makes through it. Your goal is to build and manage a network of 30 to 40 active posting partners.


munity Management

Identify and join relevant local 
munity groups across our service areas. Research which groups allow business posts and build a monthly posting calendar accordingly. Monitor groups daily during US evening hours and respond promptly and helpfully when community members ask for pest control recommendations or advice. The goal is to build Zunex into the trusted local name in the neighborhoods we serve.

Social Media Content Strategy

Our technicians are in and around homes every day. That environment produces compelling content. We will handle the photography and video in the field. We need your creative direction on what to capture and how to use it. Study the benchmark accounts we provide, understand what is working, and bring us a content strategy that represents who Zunex is across Instagram,
, and TikTok.

Tracking and Reporting

Maintain an accurate performance database for all active partners. Track link clicks, promo code redemptions, and booked services by partner. Report weekly to leadership on program performance, active partner count, social media growth, and community engagement.

The Schedule

This role requires availability during US evening hours when 
munity activity peaks. For a Philippines-based hire this means working approximately 1 AM to 9 AM Philippine time. We are upfront about this because we want someone who is genuinely set up for overnight work long term.

The Compensation

Base salary of $800 to $1,000 per month based on experience.

Performance bonus tied directly to sales generated through the influencer relationships you manage. We already have a sustainable structure in mind and will share the details with finalists. The short version is that if the program produces results you will share in those results meaningfully. We designed it this way intentionally because we want the person building this program to be motivated by outcomes not just effort.

This is meant to be a long-term position. We are investing in this program and we are investing in the person who builds it. If you produce results we will grow your responsibilities and your compensation with them.

What We Are Looking For

Strong written English is non-negotiable. You are writing outreach messages that represent our brand to creators who receive dozens of pitches and writing public content our communities see every day.

You genuinely understand Instagram Stories as a marketing format and how creators think about their audience relationships and brand partnerships.

You understand community management and know how to represent a brand in a neighborhood
 group in a way that builds trust rather than coming across as promotional.

You are naturally persistent without being pushy. Influencer outreach involves significant non-response and the right person keeps their quality and energy consistent because they understand this program builds through relationship and repetition not through a single pitch.

You are self-directed, organized, and excited about building something from scratch.

Bonus Points

Familiarity with the US lifestyle influencer space particularly the family and mommy blogger community

Experience with brand ambassador or partnership management

Experience working with US-based clients or brands

Experience with 
munity management for a brand or business

What We Offer

$800 to $1,000 per month base salary

Performance bonus tied to program results with real upside for strong performers

Long-term position with genuine growth potential

Benchmark examples from successful programs so you are not starting blind

Direct access to ownership with fast decisions and no bureaucracy

Real autonomy to build the program your way

How to Apply

Please follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Use the subject line: Influencer Specialist [Your Name]

In your message answer two questions. First describe your experience managing social media for a brand or business and one specific result you are proud of. Second describe a time you reached out to someone you did not know to pitch an idea, a partnership, or an opportunity and tell us exactly how you approached it and what happened.

Tell us your favorite snack

Attach your resume



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Senior Seller Central Specialist (Amazon Marketplace)
description:
Overview

Teton is a fast-growing outdoor gear brand focused on delivering high-quality, reliable products for adventure and everyday use. We’re passionate about innovation, customer experience, and building products that people trust in the outdoors.

We’re looking for an experienced Senior Seller Central Specialist to own and optimize our Amazon 3P (Seller Central) operations. This role is highly operational and strategic—responsible for daily execution, account health, listing optimization, and continuous performance improvement.

This is a full-time, fully remote position operating during Mountain Daylight Time (MDT) business hours.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Seller Central Operations & Order Management

• Manage daily Seller Central operations, including order monitoring, shipment verification, and issue resolution 

• Pull and track daily orders, communicate fulfillment needs with warehouse teams, and ensure all orders ship on time to maintain account health 

• Monitor late shipment rate and proactively prevent performance degradation 

• Coordinate manual shipment confirmations and resolve fulfillment discrepancies when needed 

• Manage returns workflows, including reporting and internal communication 

Inventory & FBA / FBM Management

• Own weekly inventory planning and replenishment for Seller Central (DopDop), including purchase order creation and coordination with internal teams 

• Monitor inventory levels across systems (Seller Central + Fishbowl) and identify risks or excess stock 

• Execute inventory adjustments, credit returns, and stock optimization strategies 

• Support B-stock return processes and warehouse coordination 

Account Health & Maintenance

• Monitor and maintain Seller Central account health, including late shipment rate, compliance issues, and performance metrics 

• Manage account settings, payment details, and operational configurations (e.g., vacation mode) 

• Open and manage Amazon cases related to listings, compliance, and account issues 

• Ensure all customer messages are responded to within SLA and maintain strong customer experience standards 

Listings & Catalog Management

• Own listing lifecycle: creation, optimization, and ongoing updates 

• Write and optimize product copy using keyword research and SEO best practices 

• Upload and manage images, videos, and content updates 

• Manage pricing updates and listing variations (parent/child relationships) 

• Add new ASINs and configure backend settings (FBA/FBM, pricing, inventory) 

• Execute conditional listing updates, SKU transitions, and catalog clean-up 

Performance Analysis & Reporting

• Analyze Seller Central performance data to improve conversion rate, rankings, and revenue 

• Track key metrics such as sales, conversion, and operational KPIs 

• Support reporting workflows related to orders, payments, and account performance 

Customer Experience & Issue Resolution

• Monitor and respond to customer messages daily 

• Identify recurring issues and implement solutions to improve ratings and reduce friction 

• Escalate and resolve listing or fulfillment issues impacting customer experience 

Cross-Functional Coordination

• Collaborate with warehouse, marketing, and operations teams to ensure smooth execution of Amazon initiatives 

• Communicate order volume, fulfillment needs, and operational updates to internal stakeholders

________________________________________

title: Customer Service Supervisor Zunex Pest Control
description:
About Zunex

Zunex Pest Control is a fast-growing family-owned pest control company protecting homes across Utah and Washington. We have built our reputation on honest, effective, family-safe service and over 3,000 verified five-star Google reviews. We treat every customer like a neighbor and every tea
mber the same way.

We are growing fast and we need a Customer Service Supervisor who can grow with us. This is not a title — it is a responsibility. The person we hire will own the performance and culture of our customer service team directly.

What This Role Actually Is

You will lead a small team of Customer Service Representatives who handle inbound calls, schedule services, and represent Zunex to our customers every single day. Your job is to make sure that team operates at a consistently high level — that calls are answered, that customers feel taken care of, that processes are followed, and that performance gaps are caught and corrected before they become problems.

You are not managing from a distance. You are in it with your team — listening to calls, running trainings, sitting with struggling reps, and setting the standard by how you work not just what you say.

If you are the kind of leader who gets energy from developing people, who holds standards without being harsh, and who takes personal ownership of how your team performs — keep reading.

What You Will Own

Team Leadership and Accountability

Lead daily team check-ins and set clear expectations for the day. Hold CSRs accountable to their responsibilities and performance standards. Step in directly when a tea
mber is struggling rather than waiting for the problem to resolve itself. Maintain a team culture that is high-accountability and high-support at the same time.

Call Monitoring and Auditing

Listen to recorded calls regularly and evaluate quality, professionalism, and process adherence. Track missed calls, performance gaps, and recurring issues. Conduct daily and weekly performance audits. Report what you find and ensure corrections actually happen — not just acknowledged.

Training and Development

Lead weekly team trainings with a focus on real skill development not checkbox completion. Work one-on-one with underperforming reps to identify what is going wrong and build a plan to fix it. Reinforce SOPs consistently and update training processes as the company grows and changes.

Reporting and Communication

Send weekly performance summaries to leadership with real insights not just numbers. Pull reports from FieldRoutes and other systems. Maintain clear and consistent communication with both your team and leadership. Participate in weekly leadership meetings and represent your team's performance and needs.

Process and System Management

Identify inefficiencies in how the team operates and bring solutions not just observations. Ensure FieldRoutes and other systems are being used correctly and consistently. Help refine SOPs as processes evolve. Maintain a strong working knowledge of every tool your team uses.

What We Are Looking For

You have led a team before and you know what it feels like to be responsible for other people's performance. You understand that leadership means owning outcomes not just assigning tasks.

You are comfortable having direct conversations with underperforming employees. You do not avoid conflict and you do not let problems linger. You address issues early, clearly, and constructively.

You have excellent English — written and verbal. You will be communicating with customers, your team, and leadership every day and your communication needs to be professional and clear in all three directions.

You are reliable and self-directed. Your manager should not need to check on whether things are getting done. You take ownership of your responsibilities and follow through without being managed.

You are mentally steady. Customer service leadership involves pressure, difficult customers, underperforming employees, and fast-changing priorities. The right person handles all of that without becoming reactive or inconsistent.

You are proficient in Google Workspace — Sheets, Docs, Drive, Forms, Calendar, and Gmail. This is required not optional.

Strongly Preferred

Experience with FieldRoutes — this is highly preferred and will give you a significant advantage

Experience with call monitoring systems — Voice for Pest is a plus

Previous customer service leadership experience in a remote environment

The Schedule

Full-time, Monday through Friday, 8:30 AM to 5:30 PM MST which is 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time. This is an overnight schedule for Philippines-based hires. We are upfront about this because we want someone who is genuinely set up for it long term.

Compensation and Benefits

$7 to $10 per hour based on experience and demonstrated leadership ability. Final rate determined after interview.

After your 3-month probation period you will receive paid time off that begins accruing from your start date, five self-selected paid holidays per year — US or Filipino your choice, performance-based bonuses tied to KPI achievement and contribution, and an end-of-year bonus based on overall performance.

Annual raises based on performance. This is a long-term role with real growth potential as the company scales.

How to Apply

Please follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Use the subject line: CSR Supervisor [Your Name]

In your message include a short paragraph covering two things — your experience leading a team and a specific example of how you handled an underperforming employee. Tell us what happened, what you did, and what the outcome was.

Attach your resume

nts

description:
We're looking for a sharp, reliable assistant who also happens to be deep into AI and has a creative eye — someone who keeps up with the latest tools, has opinions about them, naturally reaches for automation when it makes sense, and can produce work that looks and feels great.



You'll be managing schedules, handling communications, keeping operations running across multiple businesses, and supporting creative and marketing projects. What sets the right person apart is that they bring both an AI-powered lens and genuine creative taste to everything they do. You know how to use these tools well, not just that they exist — and you know what good looks like.



This is a long-term role with real growth potential for someone who's proactive, trustworthy, and genuinely excited about where AI is headed.



Who You Are

An experienced assistant who's also an AI enthusiast and a creative — you use these tools daily, you have taste, and you know how to make things look good. You take ownership without being asked, communicate excellently in English, and know how to prioritize what matters.



You are:

Experienced as an Executive Assistant or operations generalist

Fluent with AI agents and automation — n8n, Make, Zapier, Claude, GPT pipelines

Genuinely obsessed with AI tools and integrating them into your daily workflow

Creative with a strong eye for design, visual storytelling, or content — graphic design, video editing, or similar

Proactive, detail-oriented, and reliable

Warm, professional, and easy to work with

A natural problem-solver who figures things out independently

Adaptable and always learning



We're not just looking for someone to manage a calendar. We want someone who brings an AI-powered, creative edge to everything they touch.



What You'll Do

Manage calendars, scheduling, and day-to-day communications

Coordinate logistics and keep things organized across multiple businesses

Build and maintain AI workflows that automate repetitive tasks

Support marketing, content, and creative projects — designing assets, editing video, or producing visual content as needed

Use AI tools to accelerate creative output without sacrificing quality

Bring new tool ideas and automations to the table without being asked

Figure things out independently and own outcomes end to end



Apple ecosystem fluency is a plus — we use iMessage, FaceTime, and native Mac/iPhone apps daily. Owning a MacBook and iPhone is an advantage.



What We Offer

Flexible working hours

Long-term engagement with meaningful compensation growth

Incentives for staying and growing with the team

A high-trust environment where great work is recognized



How to Apply



Please answer the following briefly when applying:

Tell us about your background as an assistant and how you use AI in your work

Share a specific automation or AI workflow you've built — what did it do and what did it save?

What AI tools are you actively using right now?

Do you have a creative background — design, video, or visual content? Tell us about it.

Do you own a MacBook and iPhone?



Send a link to your portfolio, GitHub, or anything that shows your work.

title: Operations Service Provider - Contractor
description:
About The Engagement



College Zoom is an expert 1-on-1 counseling service that helps families navigate the U.S. college admissions process. We’re looking to contract an Operations Service Provider to manage our administrative and operational functions during the U.S. workday from 9am to 6pm Pacific Time (midnight to 9am in the Philippines), 5 days a week.   



The Operations Service Provider will process client onboarding set up,
 management, and similar back-end workflows that support the 1-on-1 counseling operation. This engagement requires a customer-service mindset, high attention to detail, and an ability to manage multiple responsibilities in a flexible, fast-paced environment.



Key Workflows:



- Client Intake & Onboarding: Take over the back-end onboarding process for new clients, ensuring all required documents are collected and properly stored.



-
 Management: Monitor the company’s general
 inbox for
s pertaining to relevant workflows, ensuring timely responses and escalating urgent matters when needed.



- Client Scheduling: Coordinate with new clients to get scheduled for first meetings, ensuring alignment with team’s availability.

Administrative Operations: Oversee document creation and updating, project tracking, and resource organization.



- Process Improvement: Recommend areas for operational improvements and support the implementation of new systems and procedures.??



Contractor Requirements:



- Bachelor’s degree (preferably in Business Administration or a related field) or 4+ years of office support experience



- Strong attention to detail, with excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple priorities.



- Experience in project management or the ability to work independently and efficiently.



- Strong communication skills, both written and verbal.



- Comfortable with Google Suite (Docs, Sheets, Calendar) and general office skills.



- Contractor is an independent contractor responsible for their own taxes (BIR) and government contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG).



How to Apply:



Please submit your resume and a cover letter to 
 look forward to learning more about how you can contribute to the College Zoom team!

title: Medical Insurance Verification Specialist
description:
Our medical clinic is looking for a full-time insurance verification specialist.



Huge room for growth! Get paid a great wage while advancing your career and working with a purpose. Our company helps patients live an active life again.





***REQUIREMENTS***



- Excellent English Skills
